29116.title: What Happens When Employers Can No Longer Discriminate in Job Ads?
29116.zh_title: 当雇主无法再在招聘广告中歧视时会发生什么？
29116.abstract: When employers’ explicit gender requests were unexpectedly removed from a Chinese job board overnight, pools of successful applicants became more integrated: women’s (men’s) share of call-backs to jobs that had requested men (women) rose by 63 (146) percent. The removal ‘worked’ in this sense because it generated a large increase in gender-mismatched applications, and because those applications were treated surprisingly well by employers. The removal had little or no effect on aggregate matching frictions. The job titles that were integrated however, were not the most gendered ones, and were disproportionately lower-wage jobs.
29116.zh_abstract: 当中国某招聘网站一夜之间意外移除雇主的明确性别要求后，成功申请者的群体变得更加融合：在原本要求男性的职位中，女性获得回应的比例上升了63%；在原本要求女性的职位中，男性获得回应的比例上升了146%。从这个意义上说，移除性别要求之所以“有效”，是因为它大幅增加了性别不匹配的申请数量，并且这些申请得到了雇主出人意料的良好对待。移除性别要求对总体匹配摩擦几乎没有影响。然而，实现融合的职位并非性别化最严重的那些，而且不成比例地集中在低薪职位上。

29115.title: Optimal Tariffs and Trade Policy Formation: U.S. Evidence from the Smoot-Hawley Era
29115.zh_title: 最优关税与贸易政策形成：来自斯穆特-霍利时代的美国证据
29115.abstract: This paper examines the political economy of U.S. trade policy around the time of the Smoot-Hawley tariff of 1930, a period when policy was unconstrained by trade agreements. We consider a model of politically-optimal trade policy for a large country that can influence its terms of trade and where workers and firms lobby for protection. The predictions of the model hinge on import demand and export supply elasticities, which we estimate using detailed U.S. import data from 1927-35, as well as industry lobbying data. We find that tariff levels are largely determined by firm lobbies, but about about 5 percentage points of the tariffs are explained by terms of trade considerations. Decomposing the politically-optimal tariff in 1931 reveals an intensification of demand for protection by workers in the Smoot-Hawley tariff.
29115.zh_abstract: 本文考察了1930年斯穆特-霍利关税法案前后美国贸易政策的政治经济学，这一时期政策不受贸易协定的约束。我们考虑了一个大国在可以影响其贸易条件且工人和企业游说寻求保护的情况下的政治最优贸易政策模型。该模型的预测取决于进口需求和出口供给弹性，我们利用1927-1935年间详细的美国进口数据以及行业游说数据对这些弹性进行了估计。我们发现，关税水平主要由企业游说决定，但大约5个百分点的关税可由贸易条件因素解释。对1931年政治最优关税的分解显示，斯穆特-霍利关税中工人对保护的需求有所加剧。

29114.title: “Unusual, Unstable, Complicated, Unreliable and Temporary” Reinterpreting the Ebb and Flow of Globalization
29114.zh_title: “异常、不稳定、复杂、不可靠且暂时”：重新解读全球化的潮起潮落
29114.authors: Michael D. Bordo, Catherine R. Schenk
29114.abstract: In 1919, John Maynard Keynes wrote his famous tract The Economic Consequences of the Peace. In that work, he anticipated the collapse of the first era of globalization that began in the mid-nineteenth century. He admonished the short-sighted assumption that these years of relative peace and prosperity for many was a permanent norm, interrupted only briefly by the Great War. The diplomatic failures, lapses in leadership, and promotion of narrow interests and vision outlined by Keynes underpinned his prediction of a backslash of economic nationalism, trade protectionism, and recession.\nThe paper revisits the turning points in the evolution of the global economic system since 1919 by focusing primarily on the evolution of the international monetary system and policy cooperation/coordination. We identify three disruptions and examine how each prompted a change in the underlying ideology about how the international monetary system should organize: World War I, Bretton Woods, 1970s Great Inflation and Managed Floating. Each turning point was characterized by different forms and institutions of cooperation, how rules (either explicit or implicit) were designed and implemented, and the crucial importance of the historical context.
29114.zh_abstract: 1919年，约翰·梅纳德·凯恩斯撰写了其著名著作《和平的经济后果》。在该书中，他预见了始于19世纪中叶的第一次全球化时代的崩溃。他告诫人们，那种认为对许多人而言相对和平与繁荣的岁月是永久常态、仅被世界大战短暂打断的短视假设是错误的。凯恩斯所概述的外交失败、领导力缺失以及狭隘利益与视野的鼓吹，支撑了他对经济民族主义、贸易保护主义和衰退反弹的预测。本文通过主要关注国际货币体系演变以及政策合作/协调，重新审视了1919年以来全球经济体系演变的转折点。我们识别出三次中断，并考察了每次中断如何促使关于国际货币体系应如何组织的潜在意识形态发生变化：第一次世界大战、布雷顿森林体系、1970年代的大通胀与管理浮动。每个转折点都以不同形式的合作与制度、规则（无论是显性还是隐性）的设计与实施方式，以及历史背景的至关重要性为特征。

29113.title: Is Online Education Working?
29113.authors: Duha Tore Altindag, Elif S. Filiz, Erdal Tekin
29113.abstract: This study examines the impact of instruction modality on student learning outcomes, with a focus on disparities observed pre- and post-pandemic. Using administrative data from a public university spanning seven pre-pandemic and five post-pandemic semesters, the analysis controls for endogenous sorting using fixed effects. The findings suggest that face-to-face (FtF) instruction results in better student performance, such as higher grades and a lower withdrawal rate. Additionally, students with greater exposure to FtF instruction are less likely to repeat courses, more likely to graduate on time, and achieve higher GPAs. The study also shows that the FtF advantage has been decreasing over time, and the differences are smaller post-pandemic. The results are consistent across student and instructor characteristics, except for Honors and graduate students, where the FtF advantage is either smaller or statistically insignificant.
29113.zh_abstract: 本研究考察了教学方式对学生学习成果的影响，重点关注疫情前后观察到的差异。利用一所公立大学涵盖七个疫情前学期和五个疫情后学期的行政数据，分析通过固定效应控制了内生性选择。研究结果表明，面对面教学能带来更好的学生表现，例如更高的成绩和更低的退课率。此外，接触更多面对面教学的学生更不容易重修课程，更有可能按时毕业，并获得更高的平均绩点。研究还显示，面对面教学的优势随时间推移而减小，且疫情后差异更小。除荣誉学生和研究生外，这一结果在不同学生和教师特征中保持一致，对于这些群体，面对面教学的优势要么较小，要么在统计上不显著。

29112.title: Consistent Evidence on Duration Dependence of Price Changes
29112.zh_title: 关于价格变动持续时间依赖性的稳健证据
29112.authors: Fernando E. Alvarez, Katarína Borovičková, Robert Shimer
29112.abstract: We develop an estimator and tests of a discrete time mixed proportional hazard (MPH) model of duration with unobserved heterogeneity. We allow for competing risks, observable characteristics, and censoring, and we use linear GMM, making estimation and inference straightforward. With repeated spell data, our estimator is consistent and robust to the unknown shape of the frailty distribution. We apply our estimator to the duration of price spells in weekly store data from IRI. We find substantial unobserved heterogeneity, accounting for a large fraction of the decrease in the Kaplan-Meier hazard with elapsed duration. Still, we show that the estimated baseline hazard rate is decreasing and a homogeneous firm model can accurately capture the response of the economy to a monetary policy shock even if there is significant strategic complementarity in pricing. Using competing risks and spell-specific observable characteristics, we separately estimate the model for regular and temporary price changes and find that the MPH structure describes regular price changes better than temporary ones.
29112.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个离散时间混合比例风险模型的估计量和检验方法，该模型考虑了未观测异质性。我们允许竞争风险、可观测特征和删失，并使用线性广义矩估计，使估计和推断变得简单。利用重复持续期数据，我们的估计量是一致的，并且对脆弱性分布的未知形状具有稳健性。我们将该估计量应用于IRI提供的每周商店数据中价格持续期的分析。我们发现存在显著的未观测异质性，这解释了卡普兰-迈耶风险率随持续期延长而下降的很大一部分。尽管如此，我们表明估计的基准风险率是递减的，并且一个同质企业模型可以准确捕捉经济对货币政策冲击的反应，即使定价中存在显著的策略互补性。利用竞争风险和持续期特定的可观测特征，我们分别估计了常规价格变动和临时价格变动的模型，发现混合比例风险结构对常规价格变动的描述优于临时价格变动。

29111.title: Fairness in Incomplete Information Bargaining: Theory and Widespread Evidence from the Field
29111.zh_title: 不完全信息谈判中的公平性：理论与来自实地的大范围证据
29111.authors: Daniel Keniston, Bradley J. Larsen, Shengwu Li, J.J. Prescott, Bernardo S. Silveira, Chuan Yu
29111.abstract: This paper uses detailed data on sequential offers from seven vastly different real-world bargaining settings to document a robust pattern: agents favor offers that split the difference between the two most recent offers on the table. Our settings include negotiations for used cars, insurance injury claims, a TV game show, auto rickshaw rides, housing, international trade tariffs, and online retail. We demonstrate that this pattern can arise in a perfect Bayesian equilibrium of an alternating-offer game with two-sided incomplete information, but this equilibrium is far from unique. We then provide a robust-inference argument to explain why agents may view the two most recent offers as corresponding to the potential surplus. Split-the-difference offers under this weaker, robust inference can then be viewed as fair. We present a number of other patterns in each data setting that point to split-the-difference offers as a strong social norm, whether in high-stakes or low-stakes negotiations.
29111.zh_abstract: 本文利用来自七个截然不同的现实世界谈判场景中关于连续报价的详细数据，记录了一个稳健的模式：参与者倾向于选择平分桌上最近两个报价之间差额的报价。我们的场景包括二手车谈判、保险伤害索赔、电视游戏节目、自动人力车出行、住房、国际贸易关税和在线零售。我们证明，这种模式可以在一个具有双边不完全信息的交替出价博弈的完美贝叶斯均衡中出现，但该均衡远非唯一。然后，我们提供了一个稳健推断的论点，来解释为什么参与者可能将最近的两个报价视为对应潜在剩余。在这种较弱的稳健推断下，平分差额的报价可以被视为公平的。我们在每个数据场景中呈现了许多其他模式，这些模式表明，无论是在高 stakes 还是低 stakes 的谈判中，平分差额的报价都是一种强大的社会规范。
29111.meta: Programs：DEV, IO, ITI, LE；JEL：C7, C78, D9, D91

29110.title: Economic Consequences of Hospital Closures
29110.authors: Diane E. Alexander, Michael R. Richards
29110.abstract: Hospitals anchor much of US health care and receive a third of all medical spending, including various subsidies. Nevertheless, some become insolvent and exit the market. Research has documented subsequent access problems; however, less is understood about broader implications. We examine over 100 rural hospital closures spanning 2005-2017 to quantify the effects on the local economy. We find sharp and persistent reductions in employment, but these localize to health care occupations and are more impactful in areas experiencing complete closures. Aggregate consumer financial health and housing markets appear unaffected by the shuttering of a rural hospital.
29110.zh_abstract: 医院是美国医疗保健的支柱，并接收了包括各种补贴在内的所有医疗支出的三分之一。尽管如此，一些医院仍会资不抵债并退出市场。研究已记录了随后的就医可及性问题；然而，对其更广泛影响的理解较少。我们考察了2005年至2017年间超过100家农村医院关闭的情况，以量化其对当地经济的影响。我们发现就业出现急剧且持续的减少，但这些影响局限于医疗保健职业，并且在经历完全关闭的地区影响更大。总体消费者金融健康和住房市场似乎未受农村医院关闭的影响。

29109.title: Intangibles, Markups, and the Measurement of Productivity Growth
29109.zh_title: 无形资产、加成率与生产率增长的度量
29109.abstract: In recent years, measured TFP growth in the US has declined. We argue that two forces contributed to this decline: the mismeasurement of intangible capital, and rising markups. Markups affect input shares, while intangibles omitted from measures of investment affect measured capital growth, each potentially generating downward bias in measured TFP growth. Most importantly, when both forces are simultaneously present, their effects reinforce each other and amplify the downward bias in measured TFP growth. Using input-output data, we estimate that this mechanism could account for one-third to two-thirds of the decline in measured TFP growth.
29109.zh_abstract: 近年来，美国测算的全要素生产率增长有所下降。我们认为有两种力量导致了这种下降：无形资本衡量的偏差，以及不断上升的加成率。加成率影响投入份额，而从投资衡量中遗漏的无形资产则影响测得的资本增长，每种力量都可能使测得的全要素生产率增长产生向下偏差。最重要的是，当这两种力量同时存在时，它们的效果会相互加强，并放大测得的全要素生产率增长的向下偏差。利用投入产出数据，我们估计这一机制可能解释了测得的全要素生产率增长下降的三分之一到三分之二。
29109.meta: Programs：CF, EFG, PR；JEL：D24, D4, E01, E22, G31

29108.title: Racial Disparities in the Health Effects from Air Pollution: Evidence from Ports
29108.zh_title: 空气污染健康影响的种族差异：来自港口的证据
29108.abstract: This study examines the uneven effects of air pollution from maritime ports on physical and mental health across racial groups. We exploit quasi-random variation in vessels in port from weather events far out in the ocean to estimate how port traffic influences air pollution and human health. We find that one additional vessel in a port over a year leads to 3.0 hospital visits per thousand Black residents within 25 miles of the port and only 1.0 per thousand for whites. We assess a port-related environmental regulation and show that the policy can help alleviate racial inequalities in health outcomes.
29108.zh_abstract: 本研究考察了来自海港的空气污染对不同种族群体身心健康的不均衡影响。我们利用远洋天气事件导致的港口船舶准随机变化，来估计港口交通如何影响空气污染和人类健康。我们发现，一年内港口每增加一艘船舶，会导致港口25英里范围内每千名黑人居民中增加3.0次医院就诊，而白人居民仅增加1.0次。我们评估了一项与港口相关的环境法规，并表明该政策有助于缓解健康结果中的种族不平等。
29108.meta: Programs：EEE, EH；JEL：D63, I14, Q51, Q53, Q58, R41

29107.title: Intangible Assets, Corporate Taxes and the Relocation of Pharmaceutical Establishments: The case of Puerto Rico
29107.zh_title: 无形资产、公司税与制药企业搬迁：以波多黎各为例
29107.abstract: Puerto Rico operated as a tax haven under U.S. Internal Revenue Code (IRC) Section 936. Firms in the pharmaceutical industry accounted for approximately 50% of tax credits awarded and 20% of employment under the program. The U.S. Congress eliminated the tax exemption program in 2006, creating a natural experiment on the elimination of corporate taxation of intangible assets. We use panel data on establishments from the Quarterly Census of Employment and Wages and a difference in difference methodology to measure the impact of the elimination of IRC Section 936 on pharmaceutical and medical devices using establishments with low, medium and high participation in the program as controls. Survival rates of all manufacturing establishments declined after the phaseout and elimination of the tax exemption program but pharmaceutical and medical devices establishments experienced an additional 6.9% decline. Approximately 50% of the 34% decline in pharmaceutical and medical devices establishments in Puerto Rico from 1995 to 2017 can be attributed to the elimination of IRC Section 936. Employment in pharmaceutical and medical devices establishments, which also declined by 34%, decreased at the same rate as that of other industries. Plant closings accounted for most of the decline in their employment.
29107.zh_abstract: 波多黎各曾根据美国《国内收入法典》第936条作为避税港运营。在该计划下，制药行业的企业约占税收抵免总额的50%和就业人数的20%。美国国会于2006年废除了该税收豁免计划，这为无形资产公司税的取消创造了一个自然实验。我们使用来自《就业与工资季度普查》的企业面板数据，并采用双重差分方法，以低、中、高参与该计划的企业作为对照组，衡量取消《国内收入法典》第936条对制药和医疗器械企业的影响。在税收豁免计划逐步取消和废除后，所有制造业企业的存活率均有所下降，但制药和医疗器械企业额外下降了6.9%。从1995年到2017年，波多黎各制药和医疗器械企业数量下降34%，其中约50%可归因于《国内收入法典》第936条的废除。制药和医疗器械企业的就业人数也下降了34%，其下降速度与其他行业相同。工厂关闭是就业下降的主要原因。

29106.title: Why do Bank Boards have Risk Committees?
29106.zh_title: 为什么银行董事会要设立风险委员会？
29106.authors: René M. Stulz, James G. Tompkins, Rohan Williamson, Zhongxia (Shelly) Ye
29106.abstract: We develop a theory of bank board risk committees. With this theory, such committees are valuable even though there is no expectation that bank risk is lower if the bank has a well-functioning risk committee. As predicted by our theory (1) many large and complex banks voluntarily chose to have a risk committee before the Dodd-Frank Act forced bank holding companies with assets in excess of $\$10$ billion to have a board risk committee, and (2) establishing a board risk committee does not reduce a bank’s risk on average. Using unique interview data, we show that the work of risk committees is consistent with our theory in part.
29106.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个银行董事会风险委员会的理论。根据这一理论，即使没有预期银行风险会因拥有运作良好的风险委员会而降低，此类委员会仍然具有价值。正如我们的理论所预测：（1）在《多德-弗兰克法案》强制要求资产超过100亿美元的银行控股公司设立董事会风险委员会之前，许多大型和复杂的银行已自愿选择设立风险委员会；（2）设立董事会风险委员会平均而言并不会降低银行的风险。利用独特的访谈数据，我们表明风险委员会的工作在一定程度上与我们的理论一致。

29105.title: Using Satellite Imagery and Deep Learning to Evaluate the Impact of Anti-Poverty Programs
29105.zh_title: 利用卫星图像和深度学习评估反贫困项目的影响
29105.authors: Luna Yue Huang, Solomon M. Hsiang, Marco Gonzalez-Navarro
29105.abstract: The rigorous evaluation of anti-poverty programs is key to the fight against global poverty. Traditional approaches rely heavily on repeated in-person field surveys to measure program effects. However, this is costly, time-consuming, and often logistically challenging. Here we provide the first evidence that we can conduct such program evaluations based solely on high-resolution satellite imagery and deep learning methods. Our application estimates changes in household welfare in a recent anti-poverty program in rural Kenya. Leveraging a large literature documenting a reliable relationship between housing quality and household wealth, we infer changes in household wealth based on satellite-derived changes in housing quality and obtain consistent results with the traditional field-survey based approach. Our approach generates inexpensive and timely insights on program effectiveness in international development programs.
29105.zh_abstract: 对反贫困项目进行严格评估是抗击全球贫困的关键。传统方法严重依赖重复的实地入户调查来衡量项目效果。然而，这成本高昂、耗时且通常在后勤上具有挑战性。在此，我们提供了首个证据，表明我们可以仅基于高分辨率卫星图像和深度学习方法进行此类项目评估。我们的应用估算了肯尼亚农村地区近期一个反贫困项目中家庭福利的变化。利用大量文献中记录的住房质量与家庭财富之间的可靠关系，我们根据卫星得出的住房质量变化推断家庭财富的变化，并获得了与传统实地调查方法一致的结果。我们的方法为国际发展项目的有效性提供了低成本且及时的见解。
29105.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, EFG, PE；JEL：C8, H0, O1, O22, Q0, R0

29104.title: The Heterogeneous Value of a Statistical Life: Evidence from U.S. Army Reenlistment Decisions
29104.zh_title: 统计生命价值的异质性：来自美国陆军重新入伍决策的证据
29104.authors: Kyle Greenberg, Michael Greenstone, Stephen P. Ryan, Michael Yankovich
29104.abstract: We estimate the value of a statistical life (VSL), or the willingness to trade-off wealth and mortality risk, among 430,000 U.S. Army soldiers choosing whether to reenlist from 2002-2010. Using a discrete choice random utility approach and significant variation in retention bonuses and mortality risk, we recover average VSL estimates between $\$500,000$ and $\$900,000,$ an order of magnitude smaller than U.S. civilian labor market estimates. We then document substantial heterogeneity by recovering indifference curves between wealth and mortality risk. The VSL increases with mortality risk within type, and soldiers in combat occupations have lower VSLs than those in noncombat occupations.
29104.zh_abstract: 我们估算了2002年至2010年间43万名美国陆军士兵在决定是否重新入伍时的统计生命价值（VSL），即财富与死亡风险之间的权衡意愿。采用离散选择随机效用方法，并利用保留奖金和死亡风险的显著变化，我们得出的平均VSL估计值在50万至90万美元之间，比美国民用劳动力市场的估计值小一个数量级。然后，我们通过恢复财富与死亡风险之间的无差异曲线，记录了显著的异质性。在同一类型内，VSL随死亡风险增加而增加，且战斗岗位士兵的VSL低于非战斗岗位士兵。

29103.title: Concentration and Resilience in the U.S. Meat Supply Chains
29103.zh_title: 美国肉类供应链的集中度与韧性
29103.abstract: Supply chains for many agricultural products have an hour-glass shape; in between a sizable number of farmers and consumers is a smaller number of processors. The concentrated nature of the meat processing sectors in the United States implies that disruption of the processing capacity of any one plant, from accident, weather, or as recently witnessed – worker illnesses from a pandemic – has the potential to lead to system-wide disruptions. We explore the extent to which a less concentrated meat processing sector would be less vulnerable to the risks of temporary plant shutdowns. We calibrate an economic model to match the actual horizontal structure of the U.S. beef packing sector and conduct counter-factual simulations. With Cournot competition among heterogeneous packing plants, the model determines how industry output and producer and consumer welfare vary with the odds of exogenous plant shutdowns under different horizontal structures. We find that increasing odds of shutdown results in a widening of the farm-to-retail price spread even as packer profits fall, regardless of the structure. Results indicate that the extent to which a more diffuse packing sector performs better in ensuring a given level of output, and thus food security, depends on the exogenous risk of shutdown and the level of output desired; no horizontal structure dominates. These results illustrate the consequences of policies and industry efforts aimed at increasing the resilience of the food supply chain and highlight that there are no easy solutions to improving the short-run resilience by changing the horizontal concentration of meat packing.
29103.zh_abstract: 许多农产品的供应链呈沙漏形状；在数量众多的农民和消费者之间，是数量较少的加工商。美国肉类加工行业的集中性质意味着，任何一家工厂的加工能力因事故、天气或近期所见的大流行导致的工人疾病而中断，都有可能引发系统性的中断。我们探讨了集中度较低的肉类加工行业在多大程度上能降低临时工厂停工的风险。我们校准了一个经济模型，以匹配美国牛肉包装行业的实际横向结构，并进行反事实模拟。在异质性包装工厂进行古诺竞争的情况下，该模型确定了在不同横向结构下，行业产出以及生产者和消费者福利如何随外生工厂停工概率的变化而变化。我们发现，无论结构如何，停工概率的增加都会导致农场到零售价格差扩大，即使包装商利润下降。结果表明，更分散的包装行业在确保给定产出水平（从而保障粮食安全）方面表现更优的程度，取决于外生的停工风险和期望的产出水平；没有哪种横向结构占据主导地位。这些结果说明了旨在提高食品供应链韧性的政策和行业努力的后果，并强调通过改变肉类包装的横向集中度来提高短期韧性并无简单解决方案。

29102.title: Internet Access and its Implications for Productivity, Inequality, and Resilience
29102.zh_title: 互联网接入及其对生产力、不平等和韧性的影响
29102.authors: Jose Maria Barrero, Nicholas Bloom, Steven J. Davis
29102.abstract: About one-fifth of paid workdays will be supplied from home in the post-pandemic economy, and more than one-fourth on an earnings-weighted basis. In view of this projection, we consider some implications of home internet access quality, exploiting data from the new Survey of Working Arrangements and Attitudes. Moving to high-quality, fully reliable home internet service for all Americans (“universal access”) would raise earnings-weighted labor productivity by an estimated 1.1% in the coming years. The implied output gains are $\$160$ billion per year, or $\$4$ trillion when capitalized at a 4% rate. Estimated flow output payoffs to universal access are nearly three times as large in economic disasters like the COVID-19 pandemic. Our survey data also say that subjective well-being was higher during the pandemic for people with better home internet service conditional on age, employment status, earnings, working arrangements, and other controls. In short, universal access would raise productivity, and it would promote greater economic and social resilience during future disasters that inhibit travel and in-person interactions.
29102.zh_abstract: 在后疫情经济中，大约五分之一的有薪工作日将在家庭中提供，按收入加权计算则超过四分之一。基于这一预测，我们利用新的《工作安排与态度调查》数据，探讨了家庭互联网接入质量的一些影响。为所有美国人提供高质量、完全可靠的家庭互联网服务（“普遍接入”）预计将在未来几年内使按收入加权的劳动生产率提高约1.1%。隐含的产出收益为每年1600亿美元，若按4%的利率资本化则为4万亿美元。在像COVID-19大流行这样的经济灾难中，普遍接入的估计流量产出回报几乎是其三倍。我们的调查数据还表明，在控制年龄、就业状况、收入、工作安排和其他因素后，疫情期间家庭互联网服务较好的人主观幸福感更高。简言之，普遍接入将提高生产力，并在未来抑制旅行和面对面互动的灾难中促进更大的经济和社会的韧性。
29102.meta: Programs：EFG, LS, PE, PR；JEL：D24, D84, E24, E27, E71, H54, J22, J24, J31, J81

29101.title: Dynamic Spatial General Equilibrium
29101.authors: Benny Kleinman, Ernest Liu, Stephen J. Redding
29101.abstract: We incorporate forward-looking capital accumulation into a dynamic discrete choice model of migration. We characterize the steady-state equilibrium; generalize existing dynamic exact-hat algebra techniques to incorporate investment; and linearize the model to provide an analytical characterization of the economy’s transition path using spectral analysis. We show that capital and labor dynamics interact to shape the economy’s speed of adjustment towards steady-state. We implement our quantitative analysis using data on capital stocks, populations and bilateral trade and migration flows for U.S. states from 1965-2015. We show that this interaction between capital and labor dynamics plays a central role in explaining the observed decline in the rate of income convergence across U.S. states and the persistent and heterogeneous impact of local shocks.
29101.zh_abstract: 我们将前瞻性的资本积累纳入一个动态离散选择迁移模型中。我们刻画了稳态均衡；将现有的动态精确代数技术推广到包含投资；并对模型进行线性化，利用谱分析为经济的转型路径提供解析刻画。我们表明，资本和劳动力动态相互作用，塑造了经济向稳态调整的速度。我们利用1965年至2015年美国各州的资本存量、人口以及双边贸易和迁移流数据，进行了定量分析。我们表明，资本和劳动力动态之间的这种相互作用，在解释观察到的美国各州收入趋同率下降以及地方冲击的持续性和异质性影响方面，发挥着核心作用。

29100.title: A Search and Learning Model of Export Dynamics
29100.zh_title: 出口动态的搜索与学习模型
29100.authors: Jonathan Eaton, Marcela Eslava, David Jinkins, C. J. Krizan, James R. Tybout
29100.abstract: Exporting abroad is much harder than selling at home, and overcoming hurdles to exporting takes time. Our goal is to identify specific barriers to exporting and to measure their importance. We develop a model of firm-level export dynamics that features costly customer search, network effects in finding buyers, and learning about product appeal. Fitting the model to customs records of U.S. imports of manufactures from Colombia we replicate patterns of exporter maturation. A potentially valuable intangible asset of a firm is its customer base and knowledge of a market. Our model delivers some striking estimates of what such assets are worth. Averaging across active exporters, the loss from total market amnesia (losing its current U.S. customer base along with its accumulated knowledge of product appeal) is US$ 3.4 million, about 34 percent of the value of exporting overall. About half is the loss of future sales to existing customers while the rest is the cost of relearning its appeal in the market and reestablishing visibility as an exporter. As finding buyers takes time, the 5-year response of total export sales to an exchange rate shock exceeds the 1-year response by about 40 percent, with the 1-year response reflecting mostly sales per exporter-importer match and the 5-year response, reflecting the number of matches almost as much as sales per match.
29100.zh_abstract: 海外出口比国内销售困难得多，克服出口障碍需要时间。我们的目标是识别具体的出口壁垒并衡量其重要性。我们构建了一个企业层面出口动态模型，该模型包含昂贵的客户搜索、寻找买家过程中的网络效应以及关于产品吸引力的学习。将该模型拟合至美国从哥伦比亚进口制成品的海关记录，我们复现了出口商成熟化的模式。企业一项潜在有价值的无形资产是其客户基础和对市场的了解。我们的模型对这些资产的价值给出了一些惊人的估计。平均而言，对于活跃的出口商，完全市场失忆（即失去其当前的美国客户基础以及积累的产品吸引力知识）造成的损失为340万美元，约占出口总价值的34%。其中约一半是未来对现有客户销售额的损失，而另一半则是重新学习其市场吸引力并重新建立作为出口商知名度的成本。由于寻找买家需要时间，总出口销售额对汇率冲击的5年响应比1年响应高出约40%，其中1年响应主要反映每个出口商-进口商匹配对的销售额，而5年响应则几乎同等程度地反映了匹配数量与每个匹配对的销售额。

29141.title: Exploring Spatial Price Relationships: The Case of African Swine Fever in China
29141.zh_title: 探索空间价格关系：以中国非洲猪瘟为例
29141.authors: Michael S. Delgado, Meilin Ma, H. Holly Wang
29141.abstract: We use a temporary ban on inter-province shipping of live hogs induced by the 2018 outbreak of African Swine Fever (ASF) in China as a natural experiment to study spatial mechanisms behind the dynamics of market integration. With a unique dataset of weekly provincial hog prices, we employ a novel spatial network model to estimate the strength of price co-movement across provinces pre and post the ban. Results indicate that, in the highly integrated national market prior to the ban, longer geographical distances between two provinces did not weaken the strength of their price linkage. The ban broken down spatial integration. Longer distances became a significant obstacle to spatial price linkage in the post-ban periods, implying faster re-integration of hog prices between proximate provinces than remote ones. The negative effect of distance can be rationalized by the interplay between arbitrage opportunities and imperfect information. Our findings highlight information transparency as a key to market integration post shipping bans used to curb animal pandemics like ASF.
29141.zh_abstract: 我们利用2018年中国非洲猪瘟（ASF）爆发引发的跨省活猪运输临时禁令作为自然实验，研究市场整合动态背后的空间机制。利用独特的省级生猪周价格数据集，我们采用一种新颖的空间网络模型来估计禁令前后各省份之间价格联动强度的变化。结果表明，在禁令前高度整合的全国市场中，两个省份之间较长的地理距离并未削弱其价格联系的强度。禁令打破了空间整合。在禁令后时期，较长距离成为空间价格联系的显著障碍，意味着邻近省份之间的生猪价格比偏远省份更快地重新整合。距离的负面效应可以通过套利机会与不完全信息之间的相互作用来合理化。我们的发现强调了信息透明度是实施用于遏制如ASF等动物疫情的运输禁令后市场整合的关键。

29140.title: The 2000s Housing Cycle With 2020 Hindsight: A Neo-Kindlebergerian View
29140.zh_title: 以2020年事后之明看2000年代住房周期：一种新金德尔伯格观点
29140.authors: Gabriel Chodorow-Reich, Adam M. Guren, Timothy J. McQuade
29140.abstract: With “2020 hindsight,” the 2000s housing cycle is not a boom-bust but a boom-bust- rebound. Using a spatial equilibrium regression in which house prices are determined by income, amenities, urbanization, and supply, we show that long-run city-level fundamentals predict not only 1997-2019 price and rent growth but also the amplitude of the boom-bust-rebound. This evidence motivates our model of a cycle rooted in fundamentals. Households learn about fundamentals by observing “dividends” but become over-optimistic in the boom due to diagnostic expectations. A bust ensues when beliefs start to correct, exacerbated by a price-foreclosure spiral that drives prices below their long-run level. The rebound follows as prices converge to a path commensurate with higher fundamental growth. The estimated model explains the boom-bust-rebound with a single shock and accounts quantitatively for the dynamics of prices, rents, and foreclosures in cities with the largest cycles. We draw implications for asset cycles more generally.
29140.zh_abstract: 以“2020年事后之明”来看，2000年代的住房周期并非一个繁荣-萧条周期，而是一个繁荣-萧条-反弹周期。使用一个空间均衡回归（其中房价由收入、便利设施、城市化和供给决定），我们表明长期城市层面的基本面不仅预测了1997-2019年的价格和租金增长，还预测了繁荣-萧条-反弹的幅度。这一证据激励了我们基于基本面的周期模型。家庭通过观察“股息”来学习基本面，但由于诊断性预期而在繁荣期变得过度乐观。当信念开始修正时，萧条随之而来，并被价格-止赎螺旋加剧，将价格推至长期水平以下。随着价格收敛到与更高基本面增长相一致的路径，反弹随之而来。估计的模型用单一冲击解释了繁荣-萧条-反弹，并在定量上解释了具有最大周期城市的房价、租金和止赎动态。我们更广泛地得出了对资产周期的启示。
29140.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：E32, G01, G4, R31

29139.title: The Opioid Safety Initiative and Veteran Suicides
29139.zh_title: 阿片类药物安全倡议与退伍军人自杀
29139.authors: Joshua C. Tibbitts, Benjamin W. Cowan
29139.abstract: We investigate the relationship between opioid diverting policy and suicides among the veteran population. The opioid epidemic of the past two decades has had devastating health consequences among U.S. veterans and military personnel. In 2013, the Veterans Health Administration (VA) implemented the Opioid Safety Initiative (OSI) with the goal of discouraging prescription opioid dependence among VA patients. Between 2012 and 2017, prescription opioids dispensed by the VA fell 41% (VA, 2018). Because this involved the aggressive curtailing of opioid prescriptions for many VA patients, OSI may have had a detrimental effect on veterans’ mental health leading to suicide in extreme cases. In addition, because rural veterans have much higher rates of VA enrollment, more prescription opioid use and abuse, and lower rates of substance abuse and mental health treatment utilization, we expect any effect of OSI on veteran suicides to be concentrated in rural areas. We find that OSI raised the veteran suicide rate relative to the non-veteran (“civilian”) rate with rural veterans suffering the lion’s share of the increase. We estimate that OSI raised the rural veteran suicide rate by a little over one-third between 2013 and 2018.
29139.zh_abstract: 我们调查了阿片类药物转移政策与退伍军人群体自杀之间的关系。过去二十年的阿片类药物流行对美国退伍军人和军事人员造成了毁灭性的健康后果。2013年，退伍军人健康管理局（VA）实施了阿片类药物安全倡议（OSI），旨在阻止VA患者对处方阿片类药物的依赖。2012年至2017年间，VA发放的处方阿片类药物下降了41%（VA，2018）。由于这涉及对许多VA患者积极削减阿片类药物处方，OSI可能对退伍军人的心理健康产生了不利影响，在极端情况下导致自杀。此外，由于农村退伍军人的VA注册率更高，处方阿片类药物的使用和滥用更多，而物质滥用和心理健康治疗利用率更低，我们预计OSI对退伍军人自杀的任何影响都将集中在农村地区。我们发现，OSI提高了退伍军人自杀率相对于非退伍军人（“平民”）自杀率的水平，其中农村退伍军人承担了增长的大部分。我们估计，在2013年至2018年间，OSI使农村退伍军人自杀率提高了略高于三分之一。

29138.title: Public Debt Bubbles in Heterogeneous Agent Models with Tail Risk
29138.zh_title: 具有尾部风险的异质性代理人模型中的公共债务泡沫
29138.abstract: This paper studies the public debt implications of a class of Aiyagari (1994)-Bewley (1977)-Huggett (1993) (ABH) models of incomplete insurance in which agents face a near-zero probability of a highly adverse outcome. In generic models of this kind, there exists a public debt bubble, so that the government is able to borrow at a real interest rate that is perpetually below the economic growth rate. Given an equilibrium with a public debt bubble, the primary deficit and the level of debt are both strictly increasing in the real interest rate and in the fraction of government expenditures used for lumpsum transfers. There is no upper bound on the deficit level or long-run debt level that is sustainable in equilibrium. In a public debt bubble, regardless of its size, agents are better off in the long run if the government chooses policies that give rise to a larger debt and primary deficit.
29138.zh_abstract: 本文研究了一类Aiyagari（1994）-Bewley（1977）-Huggett（1993）（ABH）不完全保险模型中的公共债务含义，其中代理人面临一个接近零概率的高度不利结果。在此类通用模型中，存在一个公共债务泡沫，使得政府能够以永久低于经济增长率的实际利率借款。给定一个存在公共债务泡沫的均衡，基本赤字和债务水平都随实际利率以及用于一次性转移支付的政府支出比例严格递增。在均衡中可持续的赤字水平或长期债务水平没有上限。在公共债务泡沫中，无论其规模大小，如果政府选择导致更大债务和基本赤字的政策，代理人在长期内会变得更好。

29137.title: Industrial Organization of Health Care Markets
29137.zh_title: 医疗保健市场的产业组织
29137.abstract: In this paper we outline the tools that have been developed to model and analyze competition and regulation in health care markets, and describe particular papers that apply them to policy-relevant questions. We focus particularly on the I.O. models and empirical methods and analyses that researchers have formulated to address policy-relevant questions, although we also provide an overview of the institutional facts and findings that inform them. We divide the chapter into two broad sections: (i) papers considering competition and price-setting among insurers and providers and (ii) papers focused specifically on insurance and market design. The former set of papers is largely concerned with models of oligopolistic competition; it is often focused on the US commercial insurance market where prices are market-determined rather than being set administratively. The latter focuses on insurance market design with an emphasis on issues raised by asymmetric information, leading to adverse selection and moral hazard. In addition, we discuss the literature on consumer choice frictions in this market and the significant implications of those frictions for I.O. questions.
29137.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们概述了为建模和分析医疗保健市场竞争与监管而开发的工具，并描述了将其应用于政策相关问题的具体论文。我们特别关注研究人员为应对政策相关问题而制定的产业组织模型、实证方法和分析，尽管我们也提供了为其提供信息的制度事实和发现的概述。我们将本章分为两个主要部分：（i）考虑保险公司和提供者之间竞争与定价的论文，以及（ii）专门关注保险和市场设计的论文。前一组论文主要关注寡头竞争模型；它通常侧重于美国商业保险市场，其中价格由市场决定而非行政设定。后者侧重于保险市场设计，强调由信息不对称引起的问题，导致逆向选择和道德风险。此外，我们讨论了关于该市场中消费者选择摩擦的文献，以及这些摩擦对产业组织问题的重大影响。

29136.title: What Do You Think About Climate Finance?
29136.abstract: We survey 861 finance academics, professionals, and public sector regulators and policy economists about climate finance topics. They identify regulatory risk as the top climate risk to businesses and investors over the next five years, but they view physical risks as the top risk over the next 30 years. By an overwhelming margin, respondents believe that asset prices underestimate climate risks. We also tabulate opinions about the correlation between growth and climate change; social discount rates appropriate for projects that mitigate the effects of climate change; most influential forces for reducing climate risks; and, most important research topics.
29136.zh_abstract: 我们针对861名金融学者、从业者以及公共部门监管者和政策经济学家，就气候金融主题进行了调查。他们认为，在未来五年内，监管风险是企业与投资者面临的首要气候风险；但展望未来30年，物理风险被视为首要风险。绝大多数受访者认为，资产价格低估了气候风险。我们还汇总了关于以下方面的观点：经济增长与气候变化之间的相关性；适用于减缓气候变化影响项目的适当社会贴现率；降低气候风险最具影响力的力量；以及最重要的研究课题。
29136.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EEE；JEL：G12, G14, G32, H43, Q54, Q56

29135.title: Labor Market Returns and the Evolution of Cognitive Skills: Theory and Evidence
29135.zh_title: 劳动力市场回报与认知技能的演变：理论与证据
29135.authors: Santiago Hermo, Miika M. Päällysaho, David G. Seim, Jesse M. Shapiro
29135.abstract: A large literature in cognitive science studies the puzzling “Flynn effect” of rising fluid intelligence (reasoning skill) in rich countries. We develop an economic model in which a cohort’s mix of skills is determined by different skills’ relative returns in the labor market and by the technology for producing skills. We estimate the model using administrative data from Sweden. Combining data from exams taken at military enlistment with earnings records from the tax register, we document an increase in the relative labor market return to logical reasoning skill as compared to vocabulary knowledge. The estimated model implies that changes in labor market returns explain 37 percent of the measured increase in reasoning skill, and can also explain the decline in knowledge. An original survey of parents, an analysis of trends in school curricula, and an analysis of occupational characteristics show evidence of increasing emphasis on reasoning as compared to knowledge.
29135.zh_abstract: 认知科学领域的大量文献研究了富裕国家中流体智力（推理能力）上升这一令人费解的“弗林效应”。我们构建了一个经济模型，在该模型中，一个群体的技能组合由不同技能在劳动力市场上的相对回报以及技能生产技术共同决定。我们利用瑞典的行政数据对模型进行了估计。通过结合征兵考试数据与税务登记中的收入记录，我们记录了逻辑推理技能相对于词汇知识的劳动力市场回报上升。估计模型表明，劳动力市场回报的变化解释了测量到的推理能力上升的37%，并且也能解释知识的下降。一项针对家长的原始调查、对学校课程趋势的分析以及对职业特征的分析均显示，与知识相比，对推理能力的重视程度在不断提高。

29134.title: Fiscal Stimulus with Imperfect Expectations: Spending vs. Tax Policy
29134.zh_title: 非完美预期下的财政刺激：支出政策与税收政策
29134.authors: Riccardo Bianchi Vimercati, Martin S. Eichenbaum, Joao Guerreiro
29134.abstract: This paper addresses the question: how sensitive is the power of fiscal policy at the ZLB to the assumption of rational expectations? We do so through the lens of a standard NK model in which people are dynamic-level-k thinkers. Our analysis weakens the case for using government spending to stabilize the economy when the ZLB binds. The less sophisticated people are, the smaller the government-spending multiplier is. Our analysis strengthens the case for using tax policy to stabilize output when the ZLB is binding. The power of tax policy to stabilize the economy during the ZLB period is essentially undiminished when agents do not have rational expectations. Our results are robust to whether or not Ricardian equivalence holds. Finally, we show that the way in which tax policy is communicated is critical to its effectiveness.
29134.zh_abstract: 本文探讨的问题是：在零利率下限约束下，财政政策的效力对理性预期假设的敏感程度如何？我们通过一个标准的新凯恩斯主义模型来研究，在该模型中，人们是动态层级思考者。我们的分析削弱了在零利率下限约束下使用政府支出来稳定经济的理由。人们的认知复杂程度越低，政府支出乘数就越小。我们的分析则加强了在零利率下限约束下使用税收政策来稳定产出的理由。当经济主体不具备理性预期时，税收政策在零利率下限时期稳定经济的能力基本不受影响。我们的结果在李嘉图等价是否成立的情况下都是稳健的。最后，我们表明，税收政策的沟通方式对其有效性至关重要。

29133.title: Soaking Up the Sun: Battery Investment, Renewable Energy, and Market Equilibrium
29133.zh_title: 吸收阳光：电池投资、可再生能源与市场均衡
29133.authors: R. Andrew Butters, Jackson Dorsey, Gautam Gowrisankaran
29133.abstract: Renewable energy and battery storage are seen as complementary technologies that can together facilitate reductions in carbon emissions. We develop and estimate a framework to calculate the equilibrium effects of large-scale battery storage. Using data from California, we find that the first storage unit breaks even by 2024 without subsidies when the renewable energy share reaches 50%. Equilibrium effects are important: the first 5,000 MWh of storage capacity would reduce wholesale electricity prices by 5.6%, but an increase from 25,000 to 50,000 MWh would only reduce these prices by 2.6%. Large-scale batteries will reduce revenues to both dispatchable generators and renewable energy sources. The equilibrium effects lead battery adoption to be virtually non-existent until 2030, without a storage mandate or subsidy. A 30% capital cost subsidy—such as the one in the U.S. Inflation Reduction Act—achieves 5,000 MWh of battery capacity by 2024, similar to the level required under California’s storage mandate.
29133.zh_abstract: 可再生能源和电池储能被视为互补技术，能够共同促进碳排放的减少。我们构建并估计了一个框架，用以计算大规模电池储能的均衡效应。利用加利福尼亚州的数据，我们发现，当可再生能源占比达到50%时，首个储能单元将在2024年实现盈亏平衡，且无需补贴。均衡效应至关重要：首批5000兆瓦时的储能容量将使批发电价降低5.6%，但从25000兆瓦时增加到50000兆瓦时仅能使电价降低2.6%。大规模电池将减少可调度发电机和可再生能源的收入。在没有储能强制要求或补贴的情况下，均衡效应导致电池的采用在2030年之前几乎不存在。30%的资本成本补贴——例如美国《通胀削减法案》中的补贴——将在2024年实现5000兆瓦时的电池容量，这与加利福尼亚州储能强制要求所规定的水平相近。

29132.title: Economic Development, the Nutrition Trap and Metabolic Disease
29132.zh_title: 经济发展、营养陷阱与代谢性疾病
29132.authors: Nancy Luke, Kaivan Munshi, Anu Oommen, Swapnil Singh
29132.abstract: This research provides a single explanation for: (i) the persistence of malnutrition and (ii) the increased prevalence of metabolic disease (diabetes, hypertension, cardiovascular disease) among normal weight individuals with economic development. Our model is based on a set point for BMI or bodyweight that is adapted to conditions of scarcity in the pre-modern economy, but which subsequently fails to adjust to rapid economic change. During the process of development, some individuals thus remain at their low-BMI set point, despite the increase in their consumption, while others who have escaped the nutrition trap (but are not necessarily overweight) are at increased risk of metabolic disease. The model and the underlying biological mechanism, which are validated with micro-data from India, Indonesia and Ghana can jointly explain inter-regional (Asia-Africa) differences in nutritional status and the prevalence of diabetes.
29132.zh_abstract: 本研究为以下两个现象提供了单一解释：（i）营养不良的持续存在，以及（ii）随着经济发展，正常体重个体中代谢性疾病（糖尿病、高血压、心血管疾病）患病率的上升。我们的模型基于一个适应前现代经济匮乏条件的体重指数或体重设定点，但该设定点随后未能适应快速的经济变化。因此，在发展过程中，一些个体尽管消费增加，但仍停留在其低体重指数设定点上；而另一些逃脱了营养陷阱（但不一定超重）的个体，则面临更高的代谢性疾病风险。该模型及其背后的生物学机制，通过来自印度、印度尼西亚和加纳的微观数据得到验证，能够共同解释区域间（亚洲-非洲）在营养状况和糖尿病患病率上的差异。

29131.title: No Free Launch: At-Risk Entry by Generic Drug Firms
29131.zh_title: 没有免费的上市：仿制药企业的风险进入
29131.authors: Keith M. Drake, Robert He, Thomas McGuire, Alice K. Ndikumana
29131.abstract: After receiving FDA approval, a generic drug manufacturer can launch “at risk” before conclusion of any patent infringement litigation, but it risks paying damages if it loses. The generic can eliminate the risk by waiting to launch until the appeals process is complete but waiting has downsides too. We develop a model that implies that, after the generic has won a district court decision, at-risk entry is generally profitable and will occur quickly unless the cost of waiting for the appeal is very low. We examine generic drug applications that have received FDA approval with “first-filer” status (which precludes later filing generics from entering before the first filer). In our data, the generic and brand usually settled prior to the conclusion of litigation. For the remainder, drugs that received FDA approval prior to a favorable district court decision were always launched at risk. Generics without FDA approval before a favorable district court decision launched upon approval unless the approval was close in time to the appeal decision or it had forfeited the first filer exclusivity (indicating a low cost of waiting). We also consider implications of at-risk entry for social welfare, arguing that at-risk entry is analogous to a “buy out” of the patent with favorable welfare implications in both the short run (consumer prices) and long run (efficient incentives for R&D).
29131.zh_abstract: 在获得美国食品药品监督管理局批准后，仿制药制造商可以在任何专利侵权诉讼结束前“冒险”上市，但如果败诉，则需承担支付损害赔偿的风险。仿制药企业可以通过等待上诉程序结束再上市来消除风险，但等待也有弊端。我们构建了一个模型，该模型表明，在仿制药企业赢得地区法院判决后，风险进入通常是有利可图的，并且除非等待上诉的成本非常低，否则会迅速发生。我们研究了已获得美国食品药品监督管理局批准且具有“首仿”资格（这阻止了后续申请的仿制药在首仿企业之前进入市场）的仿制药申请。在我们的数据中，仿制药企业和品牌药企业通常在诉讼结束前达成和解。对于其余案例，在获得有利的地区法院判决之前就已获得美国食品药品监督管理局批准的药物，总是以风险方式上市。在获得有利的地区法院判决之前未获得美国食品药品监督管理局批准的仿制药，则在获批后立即上市，除非批准时间与上诉判决时间接近，或者该企业已丧失首仿独占权（表明等待成本较低）。我们还考虑了风险进入对社会福利的影响，认为风险进入类似于对专利的“买断”，在短期内（消费者价格）和长期内（为研发提供有效激励）都具有有利的福利影响。

29130.title: Return on Student Loans in Canada
29130.zh_title: 加拿大学生贷款的回报率
29130.authors: Lance Lochner, Qian Liu, Martin Gervais
29130.abstract: This paper uses new administrative data with detailed borrower information and lengthy repayment histories from the Canada Student Loans Program (CSLP) to measure rates of return on undergraduate student loans. We document substantial heterogeneity in returns based on information available at the time loans were disbursed, including province of residence, field of study, and institution of attendance. Field of study is a particularly important determinant of rates of return, explaining 22% of the variation in predicted returns across borrowers. We explore the implications of this variation for CSLP cross-subsidization across borrowers and potential risk-based loan limits. Given the variation in ex ante predicted returns across borrowers, using all available information at the time of loan disbursement, we study the implications of potential cream-skimming of high-return borrowers by private lenders.
29130.zh_abstract: 本文利用加拿大助学贷款计划的新行政数据，其中包含详细的借款人信息和漫长的还款历史，来衡量本科生学生贷款的回报率。我们根据贷款发放时可获得的信息，包括居住省份、学习领域和就读院校，记录了回报率的显著异质性。学习领域是回报率的一个特别重要的决定因素，它解释了借款人之间预测回报率差异的22%。我们探讨了这种差异对加拿大助学贷款计划中借款人之间交叉补贴以及潜在的风险导向贷款限额的影响。鉴于借款人之间事前预测回报率的差异，利用贷款发放时可获得的所有信息，我们研究了私人贷款机构可能对高回报借款人进行“撇脂”的影响。
29130.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PE；JEL：D14, H52, H81, I22, I28, J24

29129.title: Can Monetary Policy Create Fiscal Capacity?
29129.zh_title: 货币政策能否创造财政空间？
29129.authors: Vadim Elenev, Tim Landvoigt, Patrick J. Shultz, Stijn Van Nieuwerburgh
29129.abstract: Governments around the world have gone on a massive fiscal expansion in response to the Covid crisis, increasing government debt to levels not seen in 75 years. How will this debt be repaid? What role do conventional and unconventional monetary policy play? We investigate debt sustainability in a New Keynesian model with an intermediary sector, realistic fiscal and monetary policy, endogenous convenience yields, and substantial risk premia. When conventional monetary policy is constrained by the ZLB during an economic crisis, increased government spending and lower tax revenue lead to a large rise in government debt and raise the risk of future tax increases. We find that quantitative easing (QE), forward guidance, and an expansion in government discretionary spending all contribute to lowering debt/GDP ratio and reducing this fiscal risk. A transitory QE policy deployed during a crisis stimulates aggregate demand.
29129.zh_abstract: 世界各国政府为应对新冠疫情危机实施了大规模财政扩张，导致政府债务水平达到75年来未见的程度。这些债务将如何偿还？常规和非常规货币政策扮演什么角色？我们在一个包含中介部门、现实财政与货币政策、内生便利收益以及显著风险溢价的新凯恩斯主义模型中研究债务可持续性。当经济危机期间常规货币政策受到零利率下限约束时，增加的政府支出和减少的税收收入导致政府债务大幅上升，并增加了未来增税的风险。我们发现，量化宽松、前瞻性指引以及政府可自由支配支出的扩张都有助于降低债务与国内生产总值比率并减少这种财政风险。在危机期间部署的暂时性量化宽松政策会刺激总需求。
29129.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：E1, E12, E13, E2, E31, E32, E37, E4, E42, E43, E44, E6, E62, E63, G12, G18, G21

29128.title: The Treasury Market in Spring 2020 and the Response of the Federal Reserve
29128.zh_title: 2020年春季的国债市场与美联储的应对
29128.abstract: Treasury yields spiked during the initial phase of COVID. The 10-year yield increased by 64 bps from March 9 to 18, 2020, leading the Federal Reserve to purchase $\$1$T of Treasuries in 2020Q1. Fed purchases were causal for reducing Treasury yields based on the timing of purchases (which increased on March 19), the timing of yield reversal and Fed purchases in the MBS market, and evidence against confounding factors. Treasury-QE worked more via purchases than announcements. The yield spike was driven by liquidity needs of mutual funds, foreign official agencies, and hedge funds that were unaffected by the March 15 Treasury-QE announcement.
29128.zh_abstract: 在新冠疫情初期，国债收益率飙升。10年期收益率在2020年3月9日至18日期间上升了64个基点，促使美联储在2020年第一季度购买了1万亿美元的国债。基于购买时机（3月19日购买量增加）、收益率反转的时机以及美联储在抵押贷款支持证券市场的购买行为，并排除了混杂因素的证据，美联储的购买行为是降低国债收益率的原因。量化宽松政策通过购买行为而非公告发挥了更大作用。收益率飙升是由共同基金、外国官方机构和对冲基金的流动性需求驱动的，这些需求并未受到3月15日国债量化宽松公告的影响。

29127.title: Retrospective Search: Exploration and Ambition on Uncharted Terrain
29127.zh_title: 回顾性搜索：在未知领域的探索与雄心
29127.abstract: We study a model of retrospective search in which an agent—a researcher, an online shopper, or a politician—tracks the value of a product. Discoveries beget discoveries and their observations are correlated over time, which we model using a Brownian motion. The agent, a standard exponential discounter, decides the breadth and length of search. We fully characterize the optimal search policy. The optimal search scope is U-shaped, with the agent searching most ambitiously when approaching a breakthrough or when nearing search termination. A drawdown stopping boundary is optimal, where the agent ceases search whenever current observations fall a constant amount below the maximal achieved alternative. We also show special features that emerge from contracting with a retrospective searcher.
29127.zh_abstract: 我们研究了一个回顾性搜索模型，其中代理人——如研究人员、在线购物者或政治家——追踪某个产品的价值。发现会引发更多发现，且其观测值随时间相关，我们使用布朗运动对此进行建模。该代理人是一个标准的指数折现者，决定搜索的广度和长度。我们完整刻画了最优搜索策略。最优搜索范围呈U形，当代理人接近突破或即将终止搜索时，其搜索最为雄心勃勃。一个回撤停止边界是最优的，即当当前观测值持续低于已实现的最大替代值一个固定幅度时，代理人停止搜索。我们还展示了与回顾性搜索者签订合同时出现的特殊特征。
29127.meta: Programs：IO, LE, LS, POL；JEL：C61, C73, D25, D83

29126.title: The Past and Future of Economic Growth: A Semi-Endogenous Perspective
29126.zh_title: 经济增长的过去与未来：半内生视角
29126.abstract: The nonrivalry of ideas gives rise to increasing returns, a fact celebrated in Paul Romer's recent Nobel Prize. An implication is that the long-run rate of economic growth is the product of the degree of increasing returns and the growth rate of research effort; this is the essence of semi-endogenous growth theory. This paper interprets past and future growth from a semi-endogenous perspective. For 50+ years, U.S. growth has substantially exceeded its long-run rate because of rising educational attainment, declining misallocation, and rising (global) research intensity, implying that frontier growth could slow markedly in the future. Other forces push in the opposite direction. First is the prospect of "finding new Einsteins": how many talented researchers have we missed historically because of the underdevelopment of China and India and because of barriers that discouraged women inventors? Second is the longer-term prospect that artificial intelligence could augment or even replace people as researchers. Throughout, the paper highlights many opportunities for further research.
29126.zh_abstract: 思想的非竞争性导致了规模报酬递增，这一事实在保罗·罗默最近的诺贝尔奖中得到了强调。其含义是，长期经济增长率是规模报酬递增程度与研究努力增长率的乘积；这是半内生增长理论的本质。本文从半内生视角解读过去和未来的增长。在50多年的时间里，由于教育程度的提高、资源错配的减少以及（全球）研发强度的上升，美国增长已大幅超过其长期增长率，这意味着前沿增长未来可能显著放缓。其他力量则朝着相反方向推动。首先是“寻找新爱因斯坦”的前景：历史上，由于中国和印度的发展不足以及阻碍女性发明家的壁垒，我们错过了多少有才华的研究人员？其次是长期前景，即人工智能可能增强甚至取代人类作为研究人员。全文强调了进一步研究的许多机会。

29125.title: Obedience in the Labor Market and Social Mobility: A Socio-Economic Approach
29125.zh_title: 劳动力市场中的服从性与社会流动性：一种社会经济方法
29125.abstract: This paper presents an analysis of what types of values, especially in regards to obedience vs. independence, families impart to their children and how these values interact with social mobility. In the model, obedience is a useful characteristic for employers, especially when wages are low, because independent workers require more incentives (when wages are high, these incentives are automatic). Hence, in low-wage environments, low-income families will impart values of obedience to their children to prevent disadvantaging them in the labor market. To the extent that independence is useful for entrepreneurial activities, this then depresses their social mobility. High-income and privileged parents, on the other hand, always impart values of independence, since they expect that their children can enter into higher-income entrepreneurial (or managerial) activities thanks to their family resources and privileges. I also discuss how political activity can be hampered when labor market incentives encourage greater obedience and how this can generate multiple steady states with different patterns of social hierarchy and mobility.
29125.zh_abstract: 本文分析了家庭向子女传递何种类型的价值观（特别是关于服从与独立），以及这些价值观如何与社会流动性相互作用。在模型中，服从性对雇主而言是一个有用的特征，尤其是在工资较低时，因为独立的工人需要更多激励（当工资较高时，这些激励是自动的）。因此，在低工资环境中，低收入家庭会向子女灌输服从的价值观，以避免他们在劳动力市场中处于不利地位。由于独立性对创业活动有用，这进而抑制了他们的社会流动性。另一方面，高收入和特权父母总是灌输独立的价值观，因为他们期望子女能够凭借家庭资源和特权进入高收入的创业（或管理）活动。我还讨论了当劳动力市场激励鼓励更大程度的服从时，政治活动如何受到阻碍，以及这如何产生具有不同社会等级和流动性模式的多重稳态。

29124.title: Valid t-ratio Inference for IV
29124.zh_title: 工具变量法的有效t比率推断
29124.authors: David S. Lee, Justin McCrary, Marcelo J. Moreira, Jack R. Porter
29124.abstract: In the single-IV model, researchers commonly rely on t-ratio-based inference, even though the literature has quantified its potentially severe large-sample distortions. Building on Stock and Yogo (2005), we introduce the tF critical value function, leading to a standard error adjustment that is a smooth function of the first-stage F-statistic. For one-quarter of specifications in 61 AER papers, corrected standard errors are at least 49 and 136 percent larger than conventional 2SLS standard errors at the 5-percent and 1-percent significance levels, respectively. tF confidence intervals have shorter expected length than those of Anderson and Rubin (1949), whenever both are bounded.
29124.zh_abstract: 在单一工具变量模型中，研究人员通常依赖基于t比率的推断，尽管文献已量化了其潜在严重的样本扭曲。基于Stock和Yogo（2005），我们引入了tF临界值函数，从而得出一个标准误调整，该调整是第一阶段F统计量的平滑函数。在61篇《美国经济评论》论文中四分之一的设定下，校正后的标准误在5%和1%显著性水平上分别比传统两阶段最小二乘标准误至少大49%和136%。当两者都有界时，tF置信区间的期望长度比Anderson和Rubin（1949）的置信区间更短。
29124.meta: Programs：CF, CH, DEV, ED, EH, IO, LE, LS, PE；JEL：C01, C1, C26, C36

29123.title: What We Teach About Race and Gender: Representation in Images and Text of Children’s Books
29123.zh_title: 我们如何教授种族与性别：儿童书籍图像和文本中的代表性
29123.authors: Anjali Adukia, Alex Eble, Emileigh Harrison, Hakizumwami Birali Runesha, Teodora Szasz
29123.abstract: Books shape how children learn about society and norms, in part through representation of different characters. We introduce new artificial intelligence methods for systematically converting images into data and apply them, along with text analysis methods, to measure the representation of skin color, race, gender, and age in award winning children’s books widely read in homes, classrooms, and libraries over the last century. We find that more characters with darker skin color appear over time, but the most influential books persistently depict characters with lighter skin color, on average, than other books, even after conditioning on race; we also find that children are depicted with lighter skin than adults on average. Relative to their growing share of the U.S. population, Black and Latinx people are underrepresented in these same books, while White males are overrepresented. Over time, females are increasingly present but appear less often in text than in images, suggesting greater symbolic inclusion in pictures than substantive inclusion in stories. We then present analysis of the supply of, and demand for, books with different levels of representation to better understand the economic behavior that may contribute to these patterns. On the demand side, we show that people consume books that center their own identities. On the supply side, we document higher prices for books that center non-dominant social identities and fewer copies of these books in libraries that serve predominantly White communities. Lastly, we show that the types of children’s books purchased in a neighborhood are related to local political beliefs.
29123.zh_abstract: 书籍塑造了儿童学习社会与规范的方式，部分通过不同角色的代表性实现。我们引入了新的人工智能方法，系统地将图像转换为数据，并结合文本分析方法，测量了过去一个世纪中在家庭、教室和图书馆广泛阅读的获奖儿童书籍中肤色、种族、性别和年龄的代表性。我们发现，随着时间的推移，肤色较深的角色出现得更多，但最具影响力的书籍平均而言持续描绘肤色较浅的角色，即使在控制种族后也是如此；我们还发现，儿童平均被描绘得比成人肤色更浅。相对于其在美国人口中不断增长的份额，黑人和拉丁裔在这些书籍中的代表性不足，而白人男性则被过度代表。随着时间的推移，女性出现得越来越多，但在文本中出现的频率低于图像中，这表明在图片中的象征性包容多于故事中的实质性包容。然后，我们分析了具有不同代表性水平的书籍的供给和需求，以更好地理解可能导致这些模式的经济行为。在需求方面，我们表明人们消费以自身身份为中心的书籍。在供给方面，我们记录了以非主导社会身份为中心的书籍价格更高，并且在主要为白人社区服务的图书馆中这些书籍的副本更少。最后，我们表明社区购买的儿童书籍类型与当地政治信仰相关。
29123.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, POL；JEL：I21, I24, J15, J16, Z1

29122.title: Trade-Policy Dynamics: Evidence from 60 Years of U.S.-China Trade
29122.zh_title: 贸易政策动态：来自60年中美贸易的证据
29122.authors: George A. Alessandria, Shafaat Y. Khan, Armen Khederlarian, Kim J. Ruhl, Joseph B. Steinberg
29122.abstract: We study the growth of Chinese exports to the United States, from autarky during 1950–1970 to 15 percent of overall U.S. imports in 2008, taking advantage of the rich heterogeneity in trade policy and trade growth across products during this period. Central to our analysis is an accounting for the dynamics of trade flows, observed trade policy, and expectations about future policy. In our empirical analysis, we estimate the dynamics of the elasticity of Chinese exports to (i) past tariff changes and (ii) the risk of future tariff hikes. We find that Chinese exports responded slowly to the tariff changes that occurred when China was granted Most Favored Nation status in 1980, and that policy uncertainty was more important in the immediate aftermath of this liberalization than in the lead-up to China’s 2001 accession to the World Trade Organization. It is difficult, however, to separately identify these two effects using data alone. In our quantitative analysis, we disentangle these effects by using a structural model to estimate a path of trade-policy expectations. We find that the 1980 reform was largely a surprise and initially had a high probability of being reversed. The likelihood of reversal dropped considerably during the mid 1980s but changed little throughout the late 1990s and early 2000s despite China’s accession to the World Trade Organization in 2001.
29122.zh_abstract: 我们研究了中国对美出口的增长，从1950-1970年的自给自足状态到2008年占美国总进口的15%，利用了这一时期各产品在贸易政策和贸易增长方面的丰富异质性。我们分析的核心是对贸易流动态、观察到的贸易政策以及未来政策预期的核算。在实证分析中，我们估计了中国出口对（i）过去关税变化和（ii）未来关税上调风险的弹性动态。我们发现，中国出口对1980年中国获得最惠国待遇时发生的关税变化反应缓慢，并且政策不确定性在这次自由化后的直接影响比在中国2001年加入世界贸易组织前夕更为重要。然而，仅使用数据很难单独识别这两种效应。在定量分析中，我们通过使用结构模型估计贸易政策预期的路径来厘清这些效应。我们发现，1980年的改革在很大程度上是一个意外，并且最初被逆转的概率很高。逆转的可能性在1980年代中期大幅下降，但在1990年代末和2000年代初，尽管中国于2001年加入世界贸易组织，这一可能性变化不大。

29121.title: Women's Well-Being During a Pandemic and its Containment
29121.zh_title: 疫情期间及防控措施下的女性福祉
29121.authors: Natalie Bau, Gaurav Khanna, Corinne Low, Manisha Shah, Sreyashi Sharmin, Alessandra Voena
29121.abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic brought the dual crises of disease and the containment policies designed to mitigate it. Yet, there is little evidence on the impacts of these policies on women in lower-income countries, where there may be limited social safety nets to absorb these shocks. We conduct a large phone survey and leverage India's geographically varied containment policies to estimate the association between the pandemic and containment policies and measures of women's well-being, including mental health and food security. On aggregate, the pandemic resulted in dramatic income losses, increases in food insecurity, and declines in female mental health. While potentially crucial to stem the spread of COVID-19, the greater prevalence of containment policies is associated with increased food insecurity, particularly for women, and reduced female mental health. For surveyed women, moving from zero to average containment levels is associated with a 38% increase in the likelihood of reporting more depression, a 73% increase in reporting more exhaustion, and a 44% increase in reporting more anxiety. Women whose social position may make them more vulnerable—those with daughters and those living in female-headed households—experience even larger declines in mental health.
29121.zh_abstract: COVID-19大流行带来了疾病和旨在缓解疫情的防控政策的双重危机。然而，关于这些政策对低收入国家女性影响的证据很少，这些国家可能缺乏吸收这些冲击的社会安全网。我们进行了一项大规模电话调查，并利用印度地理上多样化的防控政策，来估计大流行和防控政策与女性福祉指标（包括心理健康和粮食安全）之间的关联。总体而言，大流行导致了巨大的收入损失、粮食不安全加剧以及女性心理健康状况下降。虽然防控政策可能对遏制COVID-19传播至关重要，但防控政策的更高普及率与粮食不安全加剧（尤其是对女性而言）以及女性心理健康状况下降相关。对于受访女性而言，从零防控水平转向平均防控水平，与报告更抑郁的可能性增加38%、报告更疲惫的可能性增加73%以及报告更焦虑的可能性增加44%相关。那些社会地位可能使其更脆弱的女性——有女儿的女性和生活在女性户主家庭的女性——心理健康状况下降幅度更大。
29121.meta: Programs：DEV, EH；JEL：I14, I15, J16, O12, O38

29120.title: Lobbying Behind the Frontier
29120.authors: Matilde Bombardini, Olimpia Cutinelli Rendina, Francesco Trebbi
29120.abstract: This chapter investigates the non-market response of firms to international trade shocks increasing the level of competition in U.S. industries. Lobbying expenditures increase as a consequence of import changes related to the China shock. The effect on lobbying is not homogeneous across firms and it concentrates particularly in those producers which are behind the technological frontier. We discuss theoretical mechanisms driving lobbying of firms away from the technological frontier: not only the cost-benefit trade-off between innovation and lobbying is relatively less appealing for low productivity firms, but the collective action ability of low productivity firms improves after a competitive shock.
29120.zh_abstract: 本章研究了企业面对国际贸易冲击（即美国行业竞争加剧）时的非市场反应。与“中国冲击”相关的进口变化导致游说支出增加。游说效应在不同企业间并不均匀，尤其集中在那些处于技术前沿之后的生产者中。我们讨论了推动远离技术前沿的企业进行游说的理论机制：不仅创新与游说之间的成本收益权衡对低生产率企业相对缺乏吸引力，而且竞争冲击后低生产率企业的集体行动能力有所提升。

29119.title: Native Americans’ Experience of Chronic Distress in the USA
29119.zh_title: 美国原住民的长期心理困扰经历
29119.abstract: Four million Native Americans who identify as single race live in the USA. Another three million identify as Native American in combination with another race. Yet they are rarely the focus of detailed research. We provide the first evidence that levels of consistently poor mental health, or chronic distress, among Native peoples were greater in every year between 1993 and 2020 than among White or Black Americans. We find this to be present among those over the age of thirty but less so for the young. Over time we demonstrate there has been a rise in chronic distress among Native Americans and multi-race individuals. However, chronic distress seems to be lowest among Native peoples living in the seven states with the largest Native American populations of Alaska, Arizona, Montana, New Mexico, North Dakota, South Dakota and Oklahoma. In our judgment these facts are important and not widely known. This stands in stark contrast to the enormous scholarly and media interest in declining physiological well-being among White Americans.
29119.zh_abstract: 美国有400万自认为单一族裔的原住民，另有300万自认为与其他族裔混合的原住民。然而，他们很少成为详细研究的焦点。我们首次提供证据表明，在1993年至2020年间的每一年，原住民群体中持续心理健康状况不佳（即长期心理困扰）的水平均高于白人或非裔美国人。我们发现这种情况存在于30岁以上的人群中，但在年轻人中较少。随着时间的推移，我们证明原住民和多种族个体的长期心理困扰有所上升。然而，在阿拉斯加、亚利桑那、蒙大拿、新墨西哥、北达科他、南达科他和俄克拉荷马这七个原住民人口最多的州，原住民的长期心理困扰似乎最低。我们认为这些事实很重要且未被广泛知晓。这与学术界和媒体对白人美国人生理健康下降的巨大兴趣形成鲜明对比。

29118.title: Headwinds and Tailwinds: Implications of Inefficient Retail Energy Pricing for Energy Substitution
29118.zh_title: 逆风与顺风：低效零售能源定价对能源替代的影响
29118.abstract: Electrification of transportation and buildings to reduce greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions requires massive switching from natural gas and refined petroleum products. All three end-use energy sources are mispriced due in part to the unpriced pollution they emit. Natural gas and electricity utilities also face the classic natural monopoly challenge of recovering fixed costs while maintaining efficient pricing. We study the magnitude of these distortions for electricity, natural gas, and gasoline purchased by residential customers across the continental US. We find that the net distortion in pricing electricity is much greater than for natural gas or gasoline. Residential customers in much of the country face electricity prices that are well above social marginal cost (private marginal cost plus unpriced externalities), while in some areas with large shares of coal-fired generation, prices are below SMC. Combining our estimates of marginal price and SMC for each of the fuels with a large survey of California households' energy use, we calculate the distribution of annual fuel costs for space heating, water heating, and electric vehicles under actual pricing versus setting price at SMC. We find that moving prices for all three fuels to equal their SMC would significantly increase the incentive for Californians to switch to electricity for these energy services.
29118.zh_abstract: 为减少温室气体排放而推动交通和建筑电气化，需要大规模从天然气和精炼石油产品转换。这三种终端能源均因未定价的污染排放而定价扭曲。天然气和电力公用事业还面临经典的自然垄断挑战：在维持高效定价的同时回收固定成本。我们研究了这些扭曲对美国大陆居民用户购买的电力、天然气和汽油的影响程度。我们发现，电力的净定价扭曲远大于天然气或汽油。美国大部分地区的居民用户面临远高于社会边际成本（私人边际成本加上未定价的外部性）的电力价格，而在一些燃煤发电占比高的地区，价格低于社会边际成本。我们将每种燃料的边际价格和社会边际成本估计值与加州家庭能源使用的大规模调查相结合，计算了在实际定价与社会边际成本定价下，空间供暖、水暖和电动汽车的年度燃料成本分布。我们发现，将所有三种燃料的价格调整至等于其社会边际成本，将显著增加加州人将这些能源服务转向电力的激励。
29118.meta: Programs：EEE, IO；JEL：H23, L51, L71, L94, L95

29117.title: Does Offshoring Production Reduce Innovation: Firm-Level Evidence from Taiwan
29117.zh_title: 生产外包会降低创新吗：来自台湾企业的证据
29117.authors: Lee G. Branstetter, Jong-Rong Chen, Britta Glennon, Nikolas Zolas
29117.abstract: Does the offshoring of production degrade or enhance the innovative capabilities of manufacturing firms? We contribute to this debate by exploiting a policy shock that differentially affected the ability of Taiwanese firms to offshore some products to China. We find causal evidence that offshoring impacts both the level and nature of innovation. In the technologies directly related to product categories that could be offshored more easily after the policy shock, overall innovation levels decline and innovative effort shifts away from product innovation and towards process innovation. However, we also find evidence of a second-order positive effect of offshoring on the levels of innovation—particularly product innovation—in other parts of the firm’s portfolio. These results are consistent with the notion that offshoring production induces a complex reallocation of innovation effort within the firm, both across and within technology categories. Our paper examines this reallocation in the context of Taiwanese electronics firms, and introduces new methods that could be used to study post-offshoring reallocations of innovative effort in other contexts.
29117.zh_abstract: 生产外包是削弱还是增强了制造企业的创新能力？我们利用一项政策冲击来探讨这一争论，该冲击对不同台湾企业将某些产品外包到中国的能力产生了差异化影响。我们发现了因果证据，表明外包影响了创新的水平和性质。在与政策冲击后更容易外包的产品类别直接相关的技术中，整体创新水平下降，创新努力从产品创新转向流程创新。然而，我们也发现了外包对企业其他领域创新水平（尤其是产品创新）产生二阶积极效应的证据。这些结果与以下观点一致：生产外包导致企业内部创新努力在技术类别之间和类别内部发生复杂的重新配置。本文在台湾电子企业的背景下考察了这种重新配置，并引入了可用于研究其他背景下外包后创新努力重新配置的新方法。

29161.title: Demographics, Wealth, and Global Imbalances in the Twenty-First Century
29161.zh_title: 二十一世纪的人口结构、财富与全球失衡
29161.authors: Adrien Auclert, Hannes Malmberg, Frederic Martenet, Matthew Rognlie
29161.abstract: We use a sufficient statistic approach to quantify the general equilibrium effects of population aging on the returns to wealth, wealth accumulation, and global imbalances. Combining population forecasts with household survey data from 25 countries, we measure the compositional effect of aging: how a changing age distribution affects wealth-to-GDP, holding the age profiles of wealth and labor income fixed. In a baseline overlapping generations model this statistic, in conjunction with cross-sectional information and two standard macro parameters, pins down general equilibrium outcomes. Since the compositional effect is positive, large, and heterogeneous across countries, our model predicts that population aging will lower returns to wealth, increase wealth-to-GDP ratios, and widen global imbalances through the twenty-first century. These conclusions extend to a richer model in which bequests, individual savings, and the tax-and-transfer system all respond to demographic change.
29161.zh_abstract: 我们使用一个充分统计量方法来量化人口老龄化对财富回报率、财富积累和全球失衡的一般均衡效应。结合来自25个国家的家庭调查数据与人口预测，我们衡量了老龄化的构成效应：在保持财富和劳动收入的年龄分布不变的情况下，年龄分布的变化如何影响财富与GDP之比。在一个基准的代际交叠模型中，该统计量结合横截面信息和两个标准宏观参数，可以确定一般均衡结果。由于构成效应为正、规模较大且在不同国家间存在异质性，我们的模型预测，人口老龄化将在整个二十一世纪降低财富回报率、提高财富与GDP之比，并加剧全球失衡。这些结论可以推广到一个更丰富的模型，在该模型中，遗产、个人储蓄以及税收与转移支付体系都会对人口结构变化做出反应。
29161.meta: Programs：AG, EFG, IFM, ME, PE；JEL：E21, F21, J11

29160.title: Corrective Regulation with Imperfect Instruments
29160.zh_title: 不完美工具下的矫正性规制
29160.abstract: This paper studies the optimal design of second-best corrective regulation, when some agents or activities cannot be perfectly regulated. We show that policy elasticities and Pigouvian wedges are sufficient statistics to characterize the marginal welfare impact of regulatory policies in a large class of environments. We show that the optimal second-best policy is determined by a subset of policy elasticities: leakage elasticities, and characterize the marginal value of relaxing regulatory constraints. We apply our results to scenarios with unregulated agents/activities and with uniform regulation across agents/activities. We illustrate our results in applications to shadow banking, scale-invariant regulation, asset substitution, and fire sales.
29160.zh_abstract: 本文研究了当某些主体或活动无法被完美规制时，次优矫正性规制的最优设计。我们证明，在一大类环境中，政策弹性和庇古楔子是刻画规制政策边际福利影响的充分统计量。我们表明，最优次优政策由一组政策弹性（即泄漏弹性）决定，并刻画了放松规制约束的边际价值。我们将结果应用于存在未受规制主体/活动以及跨主体/活动实施统一规制的情景中。我们通过在影子银行、规模不变规制、资产替代和抛售等应用中的例子来阐述我们的结果。
29160.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, PE；JEL：D62, G18, G28, H21

29159.title: Intermediaries in Bargaining: Evidence from Business-to-Business Used-Car Inventory Negotiations
29159.zh_title: 谈判中的中介：来自企业间二手车库存谈判的证据
29159.authors: Bradley Larsen, Carol Hengheng Lu, Anthony Lee Zhang
29159.abstract: We analyze data on tens of thousands of alternating-offer, business-to-business negotiations in the wholesale used-car market, with each negotiation mediated (over the phone) by a third-party company. The data shows the identity of the employee mediating the negotiations. We find that who intermediates the negotiation matters: high-performing mediators are 22.03% more likely to close a deal than low performers. Effective mediators improve bargaining outcomes by helping buyers and sellers come to agreements faster, not by pushing disagreeing parties to persist, and have real effects on efficiency for some negotiations, overcoming some of the inefficiency inherent in incomplete-information settings.
29159.zh_abstract: 我们分析了批发二手车市场中数万次交替报价的企业间谈判数据，每次谈判都由一家第三方公司（通过电话）进行调解。数据显示了调解谈判的雇员身份。我们发现，谁来进行谈判调解很重要：高绩效调解员达成交易的可能性比低绩效调解员高出22.03%。有效的调解员通过帮助买卖双方更快达成协议来改善谈判结果，而不是推动持不同意见的双方坚持下去，并且对某些谈判的效率产生实际影响，克服了信息不完全环境中固有的部分低效率。
29159.meta: Programs：CF, IO, LE, TWP；JEL：C7, D8, L1, L81

29158.title: Mr. Keynes and the “Classics”; A Suggested Reinterpretation
29158.zh_title: 凯恩斯先生与“古典学派”：一种建议性的重新解释
29158.abstract: This paper revisits and proposes a resolution to an empirical and theoretical controversy between Keynes and the “classics” (or monetarists). The controversy dates to Keynes’s General Theory (1936)—most famously formalized in Hicks’s (1937) classic Econometrica article, in which the IS-LM model is first formally stated. We first replicate empirical tests formulated in the late 1960s and ’70s and show that more recent data have more statistical power and resolve the empirical debate in favor of the Keynesians, at least according to the criteria of the literature at that time. We then show, using a simple dynamic stochastic general equilibrium (DSGE) model, that the empirical tests suffer from the Lucas (1976) critique, as the conclusion fundamentally depends upon the assumed policy regime. Nevertheless, we argue, this new empirical result is useful: it provides evidence for the existence of a “Keynesian policy regime” according to which traditional monetary expansion loses its impact in the absence of a policy regime change, in the sense of Sargent (1982).
29158.zh_abstract: 本文重新审视并提出了对凯恩斯与“古典学派”（或货币主义者）之间一个实证和理论争议的解决方案。该争议可追溯到凯恩斯的《通论》（1936年）——最著名的形式化表述见于希克斯（1937年）在《计量经济学》上的经典文章，其中首次正式阐述了IS-LM模型。我们首先复制了20世纪60年代末和70年代提出的实证检验，并表明更近期的数据具有更强的统计效力，能够解决实证争论，结果有利于凯恩斯主义者——至少根据当时文献的标准是如此。然后，我们使用一个简单的动态随机一般均衡（DSGE）模型表明，这些实证检验受到卢卡斯（1976年）批判的影响，因为结论根本上取决于假定的政策体制。尽管如此，我们认为，这一新的实证结果是有用的：它为“凯恩斯主义政策体制”的存在提供了证据，根据该体制，在萨金特（1982年）的意义上，如果没有政策体制的转变，传统的货币扩张将失去其影响力。
29158.meta: Programs：ME；JEL：B0, B1, B22, E0, E12, E13, E4, E5, E50, E51, E52

29157.title: Shifting Punishment on Minorities: Experimental Evidence of Scapegoating
29157.zh_title: 对少数群体的惩罚转移：替罪羊行为的实验证据
29157.authors: Michal Bauer, Jana Cahlíková, Julie Chytilová, Gérard Roland, Tomas Zelinsky
29157.abstract: This paper provides experimental evidence showing that members of a majority group systematically shift punishment on innocent members of an ethnic minority. We develop a new incentivized task, the Punishing the Scapegoat Game, to measure how injustice affecting a member of one’s own group shapes punishment of an unrelated bystander (“a scapegoat”). We manipulate the ethnic identity of the scapegoats and study interactions between the majority group and the Roma minority in Slovakia. We find that when no harm is done, there is no evidence of discrimination against the ethnic minority. In contrast, when a member of one’s own group is harmed, the punishment ”passed” on innocent individuals more than doubles when they are from the minority, as compared to when they are from the dominant group. These results illuminate how individualized tensions can be transformed into a group conflict, dragging minorities into conflicts in a way that is completely unrelated to their behavior.
29157.zh_abstract: 本文提供了实验证据，表明多数群体成员系统性地将惩罚转移给无辜的少数族裔成员。我们开发了一项新的激励性任务——“惩罚替罪羊博弈”，以衡量影响自己群体成员的不公正如何塑造对无关旁观者（“替罪羊”）的惩罚。我们操纵了替罪羊的族裔身份，并研究了斯洛伐克多数群体与罗姆人少数群体之间的互动。我们发现，当没有伤害发生时，没有证据表明存在针对少数族裔的歧视。相反，当自己群体的一名成员受到伤害时，转移给无辜个体的惩罚，当这些个体来自少数群体时，比来自主导群体时增加了一倍多。这些结果阐明了个人化的紧张关系如何转化为群体冲突，将少数群体以与其行为完全无关的方式卷入冲突。

29156.title: The Revealed Preferences for School Reopening: Evidence from Public-School Disenrollment
29156.zh_title: 学校复课的显示性偏好：来自公立学校退学的证据
29156.authors: Thomas Dee, Elizabeth Huffaker, Cheryl Phillips, Eric Sagara
29156.abstract: Before the 2020-21 school year, educators, policymakers, and parents confronted the stark and uncertain trade-offs implied by the health, educational, and economic consequences of offering instruction remotely, in person, or through a hybrid of the two. Most public schools in the U.S. chose remote-only instruction and enrollment fell dramatically (i.e., a loss of roughly 1.1 million K-12 students). We examine the impact of these choices on public-school enrollment using unique panel data that combine district-level enrollment trajectories with information on their instructional modes. We find offering remote-only instead of in-person instruction reduced enrollment by 1.1 percentage points (i.e., a 42 percent increase in disenrollment from -2.6 to -3.7 percent). The disenrollment effects of remote instruction are concentrated in kindergarten and, to a lesser extent, elementary schools. We do not find consistent evidence that remote instruction influenced middle or high-school enrollment or that hybrid instruction had an impact.
29156.zh_abstract: 在2020-21学年开始前，教育工作者、政策制定者和家长面临着提供远程、面对面或混合教学所带来的健康、教育和经济后果所隐含的严峻且不确定的权衡。美国大多数公立学校选择了纯远程教学，入学人数急剧下降（即K-12学生流失约110万人）。我们利用独特的面板数据考察了这些选择对公立学校入学率的影响，该数据将学区层面的入学率变化轨迹与其教学模式信息相结合。我们发现，提供纯远程教学而非面对面教学使入学率降低了1.1个百分点（即退学率从-2.6%增加到-3.7%，增加了42%）。远程教学的退学效应集中在幼儿园，其次是小学。我们没有发现一致证据表明远程教学影响了初中或高中的入学率，或者混合教学产生了影响。

29155.title: Financial crises: A survey
29155.abstract: Financial crises have large deleterious effects on economic activity, and as such have been the focus of a large body of research. This study surveys the existing literature on financial crises, exploring how crises are measured, whether they are predictable, and why they are associated with economic contractions. Historical narrative techniques continue to form the backbone for measuring crises, but there have been exciting developments in using quantitative data as well. Crises are predictable with growth in credit and elevated asset prices playing an especially important role; recent research points convincingly to the importance of behavioral biases in explaining such predictability. The negative consequences of a crisis are due to both the crisis itself but also to the imbalances that precede a crisis. Crises do not occur randomly, and, as a result, an understanding of financial crises requires an investigation into the booms that precede them.
29155.zh_abstract: 金融危机对经济活动具有巨大的破坏性影响，因此成为大量研究的焦点。本研究综述了现有的金融危机文献，探讨了危机如何被衡量、是否可预测，以及为何与经济衰退相关联。历史叙事方法仍然是衡量危机的基础，但在使用定量数据方面也出现了令人兴奋的进展。危机是可预测的，其中信贷增长和资产价格高企发挥着尤为重要的作用；近期研究令人信服地指出了行为偏差在解释这种可预测性方面的重要性。危机的负面后果既源于危机本身，也源于危机前的不平衡。危机并非随机发生，因此，理解金融危机需要研究危机之前的繁荣。
29155.meta: Programs：AP, CF, DAE, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E32, E44, E7, G01, G10, N20

29153.title: Congestion on the Information Superhighway: Does Economics Have a Working Papers Problem?
29153.zh_title: 信息高速公路上的拥堵：经济学是否存在工作论文问题？
29153.authors: Lester R. Lusher, Winnie Yang, Scott E. Carrell
29153.abstract: Publishing takes a long time in economics. Consequently, many authors release “working” versions of their papers. Using data on the NBER working paper series, we show that the dissemination of economics research suffers from an overcrowding problem: An increase in the number of weekly released working papers on average reduces downloads, abstract views, and media attention for each paper. Subsequent publishing and citation outcomes are harmed as well. Furthermore, descriptive evidence on viewership and downloads suggests working papers significantly substitute for the dissemination function of publication. These results highlight inefficiencies in the dissemination of economic research even among the most exclusive working paper series and suggest large social losses due to the slow publication process.
29153.zh_abstract: 在经济学领域，出版过程耗时漫长。因此，许多作者会发布其论文的“工作”版本。利用美国国家经济研究局（NBER）工作论文系列的数据，我们表明经济学研究的传播面临过度拥挤的问题：每周发布的工作论文数量增加，平均会减少每篇论文的下载量、摘要浏览量和媒体关注度。后续的发表和引用结果也受到损害。此外，关于浏览量和下载量的描述性证据表明，工作论文显著替代了出版的传播功能。这些结果凸显了即使在最精英的工作论文系列中，经济学研究传播也存在低效率问题，并表明缓慢的出版过程导致了巨大的社会损失。

29152.title: A Watershed Moment: The Clean Water Act and Birth Weight
29152.zh_title: 分水岭时刻：《清洁水法》与出生体重
29152.abstract: The Clean Water Act (CWA) significantly improved surface water quality, but at a cost exceeding the estimated benefits. We quantify the effect of the CWA on a direct measure of health. Using a difference-in-differences framework, we compare birth weight upstream and downstream from wastewater treatment facilities before and after CWA grant receipt. Pollution only decreased downstream from facilities required to upgrade their treatment technology, and we leverage this additional variation with a triple difference. CWA grants increased average birth weight by 8 grams.
29152.zh_abstract: 《清洁水法》（CWA）显著改善了地表水水质，但其成本超过了估算的收益。我们量化了《清洁水法》对健康直接衡量指标的影响。采用双重差分框架，我们比较了在污水处理设施获得《清洁水法》拨款前后，其上游和下游新生儿的出生体重。污染仅在下游设施需要升级处理技术时才减少，我们利用这一额外变化进行了三重差分分析。《清洁水法》拨款使平均出生体重增加了8克。

29151.title: Contract Labor and Firm Growth in India
29151.zh_title: 合同工与印度企业的增长
29151.authors: Marianne Bertrand, Chang-Tai Hsieh, Nick Tsivanidis
29151.abstract: India's Industrial Disputes Act (IDA) of 1947 requires firm with more than 100 workers to pay large costs if they shrink their employment. Since the early 2000s, large Indian manufacturing firms have increasingly relied on contract workers who are not subject to the IDA. By 2015, contract workers accounted for 38% of total employment at firms with more than 100 workers compared to 20% in 2000. Over the same time period, the thickness of the right tail of the firm size distribution in formal Indian manufacturing plants increased, the average product of labor for large firms declined, the job creation rate for large firms increased, and the probability that large firms introduce new products rose. We provide evidence that these outcomes were caused by an increased reliance on contract labor among large establishments. A model of firm growth subject to firing costs suggests the rise of contract labor increased TFP in Indian manufacturing by 7.6%, occurring all through a one-time reduction in misallocation between large and small firms with negligible change in the long-run growth rate.
29151.zh_abstract: 印度1947年的《工业纠纷法》（IDA）要求员工超过100人的企业在裁员时需支付高昂成本。自21世纪初以来，印度大型制造业企业越来越多地依赖不受《工业纠纷法》约束的合同工。到2015年，员工超过100人的企业中，合同工占总就业人数的38%，而2000年这一比例为20%。在同一时期，印度正规制造业企业规模分布的右尾厚度增加，大型企业的平均劳动生产率下降，大型企业的就业创造率上升，大型企业推出新产品的概率提高。我们提供的证据表明，这些结果是由大型企业日益依赖合同工所导致的。一个考虑解雇成本的企业增长模型表明，合同工的兴起使印度制造业的全要素生产率（TFP）提高了7.6%，这完全是通过一次性减少大型企业与小型企业之间的资源错配实现的，而长期增长率的变化微乎其微。
29151.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, LS, PR；JEL：J23, J4, J5, O0, O4

29150.title: Can Restorative Justice Conferencing Reduce Recidivism? Evidence From the Make-it-Right Program
29150.zh_title: 恢复性司法会议能否减少累犯？来自“弥补过错”项目的证据
29150.authors: Yotam Shem-Tov, Steven Raphael, Alissa Skog
29150.abstract: This paper studies the effect of a restorative justice intervention targeted at youth ages 13 to 17 facing felony charges of medium severity (e.g., burglary, assault). Eligible youths were randomly assigned to participate in the Make-it-Right (MIR) restorative justice program or a control group where they faced standard criminal prosecution. We estimate the effects of MIR on the likelihood that a youth will be rearrested in the four years following randomization. Assignment to MIR reduces the probability of a rearrest within six months by 19 percentage points, a 44 percent reduction relative to the control group. Moreover, the reduction in recidivism persists even four years after randomization. Thus, our estimates show that restorative justice conferencing can reduce recidivism among youth charged with relatively serious offenses and can be an effective alternative to traditional criminal justice practices.
29150.zh_abstract: 本文研究了一项针对13至17岁面临中等严重程度重罪指控（如入室盗窃、袭击）青少年的恢复性司法干预措施的效果。符合条件的青少年被随机分配参加“弥补过错”（MIR）恢复性司法项目，或进入面临标准刑事起诉的对照组。我们估算了MIR对青少年在随机分组后四年内再次被捕可能性的影响。被分配到MIR项目使六个月内再次被捕的概率降低了19个百分点，相对于对照组减少了44%。此外，即使在随机分组四年后，累犯率的降低仍然持续。因此，我们的估算表明，恢复性司法会议可以减少被指控相对严重罪行的青少年的累犯，并可以作为传统刑事司法实践的有效替代方案。

29149.title: Procyclical Fiscal Policy and Asset Market Incompleteness
29149.zh_title: 顺周期财政政策与资产市场不完全性
29149.authors: Andrés Fernández, Daniel Guzman, Ruy E. Lama, Carlos A. Vegh
29149.abstract: To explain the fact that government spending and tax policy are procyclical in emerging and developing countries, we develop a model for the joint behavior of optimal tax rates and government spending over the business cycle.
