Our set-up relies on financial frictions, which have been shown to be critical features of emerging markets, captured by various degrees of asset market incompleteness as well as varying levels of debt-elastic interest rate spreads. We first uncover a novel theoretical result within a simple static framework: incomplete markets can account for procyclical government spending but not necessarily procyclical tax policy. Explaining procyclical tax policy also requires that the ratio of private to public consumption comoves positively with the business cycle, which leads to larger fluctuations in the tax base. We then show that the procyclicality of tax policy holds in a more realistic DSGE model calibrated to emerging markets. Finally, we illustrate how larger financial frictions, which amplify the business cycle through more procyclical fiscal policies, have sizeable Lucas-type welfare costs.
29149.zh_abstract: 为了解释新兴市场和发展中国家政府支出和税收政策具有顺周期性的现象，我们构建了一个关于最优税率和政府支出在经济周期中联合行为的模型。我们的设定依赖于金融摩擦，这些摩擦已被证明是新兴市场的关键特征，通过不同程度的资产市场不完全性以及不同水平的债务弹性利率利差来体现。我们首先在一个简单的静态框架中发现了一个新颖的理论结果：不完全市场可以解释顺周期的政府支出，但不一定能解释顺周期的税收政策。解释顺周期的税收政策还需要私人消费与公共消费之比与经济周期正相关，这会导致税基出现更大的波动。然后，我们证明，在一个以新兴市场为校准对象的更现实的DSGE模型中，税收政策的顺周期性是成立的。最后，我们说明了更大的金融摩擦如何通过更具顺周期性的财政政策放大经济周期，并产生显著的卢卡斯型福利成本。

29148.title: Should Workplace Programs be Voluntary or Mandatory? Evidence from a Field Experiment on Mentorship
29148.zh_title: 工作场所项目应该是自愿的还是强制性的？来自导师制田野实验的证据
29148.authors: Jason Sandvik, Richard Saouma, Nathan Seegert, Christopher T. Stanton
29148.abstract: In a field experiment, we find large differences in productivity treatment effects between voluntary and mandatory workplace mentorship programs. A significant portion of this difference is due to the best employees opting into the program when it is voluntary and these employees having the smallest treatment effects. Our findings suggest that pilot programs run on a voluntary group may obfuscate large potential gains. In our setting, the firm cannot rely on self-selection to help with program allocation because employees that benefit the most from the program are the least likely to participate. Our findings have implications for program evaluation, experimental design, productivity dispersion, and inequality.
29148.zh_abstract: 在一项田野实验中，我们发现自愿性和强制性工作场所导师制项目在生产率处理效应上存在巨大差异。这种差异的很大一部分是由于当项目是自愿时，最优秀的员工会选择参与，而这些员工的处理效应最小。我们的研究结果表明，在自愿群体中进行的试点项目可能会掩盖巨大的潜在收益。在我们的设定中，企业不能依赖自我选择来帮助项目分配，因为从项目中获益最多的员工最不可能参与。我们的发现对项目评估、实验设计、生产率差异和不平等具有启示意义。
29148.meta: Programs：ED, LS, PR；JEL：J24, L23, L84, M5, M53

29147.title: Publishing Economics: How Slow? Why Slow? Is Slow Productive? Fixing Slow?
29147.zh_title: 出版经济学：有多慢？为何慢？慢是否高效？如何解决慢？
29147.authors: Aboozar Hadavand, Daniel S. Hamermesh, Wesley W. Wilson
29147.abstract: Publishing in economics proceeds much more slowly on average than in the natural sciences, and more slowly than in other social sciences and finance. It is even relatively slower at the extremes. We demonstrate that much of the lag, especially at the extremes, arises from authors’ dilatory behavior in revising their work. The marginal product of an additional round of re-submission at the top economics journals is productive of additional subsequent citations; but conditional on re-submission, journals taking more time is not productive, and authors spending more time is associated with reduced scholarly impact. We offer several proposals to speed up the publication process. These include no-revisions policies; limits on authors’ time revising articles, and limits on editors waiting for dilatory referees.
29147.zh_abstract: 经济学领域的出版速度平均而言远慢于自然科学，也慢于其他社会科学和金融学。在极端情况下甚至相对更慢。我们证明，大部分延迟，尤其是极端情况下的延迟，源于作者在修改其作品时的拖延行为。在顶级经济学期刊上，额外一轮重新提交的边际产出有助于增加后续引用；但条件于重新提交，期刊花费更多时间并无产出，而作者花费更多时间则与学术影响力的降低相关。我们提出了几项加快出版过程的建议。这些建议包括不修订政策；限制作者修改文章的时间，以及限制编辑等待拖延的审稿人。

29146.title: North-South Displacement Effects of Environmental Regulation: The Case of Battery Recycling
29146.zh_title: 环境规制的南北转移效应：以电池回收为例
29146.authors: Shinsuke Tanaka, Kensuke Teshima, Eric Verhoogen
29146.abstract: This study examines the effect of a tightening of the U.S. air-quality standard for lead in 2009 on the relocation of battery recycling to Mexico and on infant health in Mexico. In the U.S., airborne lead dropped sharply near affected plants, most of which were battery-recycling plants. Exports of used batteries to Mexico rose markedly. In Mexico, production increased at battery-recycling plants, relative to comparable industries, and birth outcomes deteriorated within two miles of those plants, relative to areas slightly farther away. The case provides a salient example of a pollution-haven effect between a developed and a developing country.
29146.zh_abstract: 本研究考察了2009年美国收紧铅空气质量标准对电池回收向墨西哥转移以及墨西哥婴儿健康的影响。在美国，受影响工厂（其中大部分是电池回收厂）附近的空气中铅含量急剧下降。废旧电池对墨西哥的出口显著增加。在墨西哥，电池回收厂的生产相对于可比行业有所增加，并且这些工厂两英里范围内新生儿的出生结局相对于稍远地区有所恶化。该案例提供了一个发达国家与发展中国家之间污染避难所效应的显著例证。
29146.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, EEE, EH, ITI；JEL：F18, I14, I15, O15, Q56

29145.title: Cigarette Taxes, Smoking, and Health in the Long-Run
29145.zh_title: 香烟税、吸烟与长期健康
29145.authors: Andrew I. Friedson, Moyan Li, Katherine Meckel, Daniel I. Rees, Daniel W. Sacks
29145.abstract: Medical experts have argued forcefully that using cigarettes harms health, prompting the adoption of myriad anti-smoking policies. The association between smoking and mortality may, however, be driven by unobserved factors, making it difficult to discern the underlying long-term causal relationship. In this study, we explore the effects of cigarette taxes experienced as a teenager, which are arguably exogenous, on adult smoking participation and mortality. A one-dollar increase in teenage cigarette taxes is associated with an 8 percent reduction in adult smoking participation and a 6 percent reduction in mortality. Mortality effects are most pronounced for heart disease and lung cancer.
29145.zh_abstract: 医学专家强烈主张使用香烟有害健康，这促使了众多反吸烟政策的采纳。然而，吸烟与死亡率之间的关联可能由未观测因素驱动，使得难以辨别潜在的长期因果关系。在本研究中，我们探讨了青少年时期经历的香烟税（这可以说是外生的）对成年后吸烟参与率和死亡率的影响。青少年时期香烟税每增加1美元，与成年后吸烟参与率降低8%和死亡率降低6%相关。死亡率效应在心脏病和肺癌方面最为显著。

29144.title: The Impact of a Government Risk Pool and an Opt-Out Framing on Demand for Earthquake Protection
29144.authors: Howard Kunreuther, Lynn Conell-Price, Paul Kovacs, Katsuichiro Goda
29144.abstract: This paper describes the design and analysis of a web-based choice experiment that examines how the demand for earthquake protection in Quebec and British Columbia is influenced by the default option and the structure of the insurance plan. Homeowners in both provinces were given the opportunity to purchase protection against earthquake losses when presented with one of the following options: the current private insurance plan, a high deductible private insurance plan, and a proposed public-private risk pool. The default frame was changed so the homeowner could either opt-in by purchasing this coverage or opt-out of being given this protection and receiving a premium discount. Assigning participants to a public-private risk pool rather than the current private insurance plan increases the likelihood of purchasing earthquake protection by 151%. The opt-out frame leads to a likelihood greater than 1.6 of purchasing coverage relative to the opt-in frame when given the same plan structure. The policy implications of this finding are discussed.

29143.title: Regulatory Costs of Being Public: Evidence from Bunching Estimation
29143.zh_title: 上市公司的监管成本：来自聚集估计的证据
29143.authors: Michael Ewens, Kairong Xiao, Ting Xu
29143.abstract: The increased burden of disclosure and governance regulations is often cited as a key reason for the significant decline in the number of publicly-listed companies in the U.S. We explore the connection between regulatory costs and the number of listed firms by exploiting a regulatory quirk: many rules trigger when a firm’s public float exceeds a threshold. Consistent with firms seeking to avoid costly regulation, we document significant bunching around multiple regulatory thresholds introduced from 1992 to 2012. We present a revealed preference estimation strategy that uses this behavior to quantify regulatory costs. Our estimates show that various disclosure and internal governance rules lead to a total compliance cost of 4.1% of the market capitalization for a median U.S. public firm. Regulatory costs have a greater impact on private firms’ IPO decisions than on public firms’ going private decisions. However, heightened regulatory costs only explain a small fraction of the decline in the number of public firms.
29143.zh_abstract: 信息披露和治理监管负担的增加常被引为美国上市公司数量显著下降的关键原因。我们通过利用一个监管特性来探索监管成本与上市公司数量之间的联系：许多规则在公司公众持股量超过阈值时触发。与公司试图规避昂贵监管的行为一致，我们记录了在1992年至2012年间引入的多个监管阈值周围存在显著的聚集现象。我们提出了一种显示性偏好估计策略，利用这种行为来量化监管成本。我们的估计显示，各种信息披露和内部治理规则导致美国典型上市公司的总合规成本占其市值的4.1%。监管成本对私营公司IPO决策的影响大于对上市公司私有化决策的影响。然而，增加的监管成本仅能解释上市公司数量下降的一小部分。

29142.title: Do Lenders Still Discriminate? A Robust Approach for Assessing Differences in Menus
29142.zh_title: 贷款人仍然存在歧视吗？一种评估菜单差异的稳健方法
29142.authors: David Hao Zhang, Paul S. Willen
29142.abstract: Motivated by the assessment of racial discrimination in mortgage pricing, we introduce a new methodology for comparing the menus of options borrowers face based on their choices. First, we show how standard regression-based approaches for assessing discrimination in the menus context can lead to misleading and contradictory results. Second, we propose a new methodology that is robust these problems based on relatively weak economic assumptions. More specifically, we use pairwise dominance relationships in choices supplemented by restrictions on the range of plausible menus to define (1) a test statistic for equality in menus and (2) a difference in menus (DIM) metric for assessing whether one group of borrowers would prefer to switch to another group's menus. Our statistics are robust to arbitrary heterogeneity in borrower preferences across racial groups, are sharp in terms of identification, and can be efficiently computed using Optimal Transport methods. Third, we devise a new approach for inference on the value of Optimal Transport problems based on directional differentiation. Fourth, we use our methodology to estimate mortgage pricing differentials by race on a novel data set linking 2018--2019 Home Mortgage Disclosure Act (HMDA) data to Optimal Blue rate locks. We find robust evidence for mortgage pricing differentials by race, particularly among Conforming mortgage borrowers who are relatively creditworthy.
29142.zh_abstract: 受评估抵押贷款定价中种族歧视的启发，我们引入了一种新方法来比较借款人基于其选择所面临的选项菜单。首先，我们展示了在菜单背景下用于评估歧视的标准回归方法如何导致误导性和矛盾的结果。其次，我们提出了一种基于相对较弱经济假设的、对这些问题的稳健新方法。更具体地说，我们利用选择中的成对优势关系，并结合对合理菜单范围的限制，来定义（1）菜单相等性的检验统计量，以及（2）菜单差异（DIM）指标，用于评估一组借款人是否更愿意切换到另一组借款人的菜单。我们的统计量对借款人偏好跨种族群体的任意异质性具有稳健性，在识别方面是精确的，并且可以使用最优传输方法高效计算。第三，我们设计了一种基于方向微分的最优传输问题值推断新方法。第四，我们使用我们的方法，在一个将2018-2019年《住房抵押贷款披露法》（HMDA）数据与Optimal Blue利率锁定数据相关联的新数据集上，按种族估计抵押贷款定价差异。我们发现了按种族划分的抵押贷款定价差异的稳健证据，尤其是在相对信誉良好的合规抵押贷款借款人中。

29178.title: The Affordable Care Act After a Decade: Industrial Organization of the Insurance Exchanges
29178.zh_title: 《平价医疗法案》十年后：保险交易所的产业组织分析
29178.authors: Benjamin R. Handel, Jonathan T. Kolstad
29178.abstract: The regulated insurance exchanges set up in the Affordable Care Act (ACA) were designed to deliver affordable, efficient health coverage through private insurers. It is crucial to study the complex industrial organization (IO) of these exchanges in order to assess their impacts to date, during the first decade of the ACA, and in order to project their impacts going forward. We revisit the inherent market failures in health care markets that necessitate key ACA exchange regulations and investigate whether they have succeeded in their goals of expanding coverage, creating robust marketplaces, providing product variety, and generating innovation in health care delivery. We discuss empirical IO research to date and also highlight shortcomings in the existing research that can be addressed moving forward. We conclude with a discussion of IO research-based policy lessons for the ACA exchanges and, more generally, for managed competition of private insurance in health care.
29178.zh_abstract: 《平价医疗法案》（ACA）设立的受监管保险交易所旨在通过私人保险公司提供可负担、高效的医疗保障。研究这些交易所复杂的产业组织（IO）对于评估其在ACA第一个十年期间至今的影响，以及预测其未来影响至关重要。我们重新审视医疗保健市场中固有的市场失灵问题，这些失灵使得ACA的关键交易所监管成为必要，并调查这些监管是否成功实现了扩大覆盖范围、创建稳健的市场、提供产品多样性以及推动医疗保健服务创新的目标。我们讨论了迄今为止的实证产业组织研究，并指出了现有研究中未来可以解决的不足之处。最后，我们讨论了基于产业组织研究的政策经验教训，这些教训适用于ACA交易所，更广泛地说，也适用于医疗保健领域私人保险的管理式竞争。
29178.meta: Programs：EH, IO, PE；JEL：G22, H2, I11, I13

29177.title: Does Money Still Matter? Attainment and Earnings Effects of Post-1990 School Finance Reforms
29177.zh_title: 金钱仍然重要吗？1990年后学校财政改革的成就与收入效应
29177.abstract: Card and Krueger (1992a,b) used labor market outcomes to study the productivity of school spending. Following their lead, we examine effects of post-1990 school finance reforms on students’ educational attainment and labor market outcomes. Lafortune et al. (2018) show that these reforms increased school spending and narrowed spending and achievement gaps between high- and low-income districts. Using a state-by-cohort panel design, we find that reforms increased high school completion and college-going, concentrated among Black students and women, and raised annual earnings. They also increased the return to education, particularly for Black students and men and driven by the return to high school.
29177.zh_abstract: Card和Krueger（1992a,b）利用劳动力市场结果研究了学校支出的生产力。遵循他们的思路，我们考察了1990年后的学校财政改革对学生教育成就和劳动力市场结果的影响。Lafortune等人（2018）表明，这些改革增加了学校支出，并缩小了高收入与低收入学区之间的支出和成就差距。使用州-队列面板设计，我们发现改革提高了高中毕业率和大学入学率，这一效应集中在黑人学生和女性群体中，并提高了年收入。改革还增加了教育回报率，尤其是对黑人学生和男性而言，且主要由高中教育回报率驱动。
29177.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：I21, I24, J24

29176.title: Where the Rubber Meets the Road: Pavement Damage Reduces Traffic Safety and Speed
29176.zh_title: 关键之处：路面损坏降低交通安全与速度
29176.authors: Margaret Bock, Alexander Cardazzi, Brad R. Humphreys
29176.abstract: Road maintenance constitutes a significant component of public transportation spending at all levels of government. Formulation of efficient transportation infrastructure policy requires information about factors affecting road and traffic conditions. We generate the first causal evidence that decreasing pavement quality impacts vehicle crash rates and decreases average speed. Results from Instrumental Variable models using spatially and temporally disaggregated data from Federal-Aid Highway System (FAHS) roads in California show statistically and economically significant increases in vehicle crash rates and decreases in average vehicle speed caused by road damage. These impacts imply significant increases in social costs attributable to road damage.
29176.zh_abstract: 道路维护是各级政府公共交通支出的重要组成部分。制定高效的交通基础设施政策需要了解影响道路和交通状况的因素。我们首次提供了因果证据，表明路面质量下降会影响车辆碰撞率并降低平均速度。使用来自加利福尼亚州联邦援助公路系统（FAHS）道路的空间和时间分解数据，通过工具变量模型得出的结果显示，道路损坏导致车辆碰撞率在统计和经济意义上显著增加，平均车速显著下降。这些影响意味着道路损坏导致了显著的社会成本增加。

29175.title: Collusion, Mergers, and Related Antitrust Issues
29175.zh_title: 合谋、并购及相关反垄断问题
29175.abstract: This survey examines recent developments in economic research relating to antitrust, paying specific attention to research in the areas of collusion and merger enforcement. Research relating to both collusion and mergers has made significant advances in the last twenty years. With respect to collusion, this includes important theoretical and empirical work on the sustainability, structure, and impact of collusive schemes. With respect to mergers, this includes important work on the impact of enforcement institutions, both theoretical and empirical work on unilateral effects, and theoretical work on the selection of which mergers get proposed to antitrust agencies and optimal policy in the face of that selection. A feature of recent research is the increasing complementarity between empirical work (ranging from observational studies to model-based measurement) and theoretical work in advancing our understanding of collusive and merger-related phenomena.
29175.zh_abstract: 本综述考察了反垄断领域经济研究的最新进展，特别关注合谋与并购执法方面的研究。过去二十年中，关于合谋和并购的研究都取得了显著进展。在合谋方面，这包括关于合谋方案可持续性、结构和影响的重要理论和实证工作。在并购方面，这包括关于执法机构影响的重要工作，关于单边效应的理论和实证工作，以及关于哪些并购会被提交给反垄断机构的选择问题以及面对这种选择时的最优政策的理论工作。近期研究的一个特点是，实证工作（从观察性研究到基于模型的测量）与理论工作之间的互补性日益增强，这增进了我们对合谋和并购相关现象的理解。

29174.title: Specialized Investments and Firms’ Boundaries: Evidence from Textual Analysis of Patents
29174.zh_title: 专用性投资与企业边界：来自专利文本分析的证据
29174.authors: Jan Bena, Isil Erel, Daisy Wang, Michael S. Weisbach
29174.abstract: Inducing firms to make specialized investments through bilateral contracts can be challenging because of potential hold- up problems. Such contracting difficulties have long been argued to be an important reason for acquisitions. To evaluate the extent to which this motivation leads to mergers, we perform a textual analysis of the patents filed by the same lead inventors of the target firms before and after the mergers. We find that patents of inventors from target firms become 28.9% to 46.8% more specific to those of acquirers’ inventors following completed mergers, benchmarked against patents filed by targets and a group of counterfactual acquirers. This pattern is stronger for vertical mergers that are likely to require specialized investments. There is no change in the specificity of patents for mergers that are announced but not consummated. Overall, we provide empirical evidence that contracting issues in motivating specialized investment can be a motive for acquisitions.
29174.zh_abstract: 通过双边合同促使企业进行专用性投资可能因潜在的敲竹杠问题而具有挑战性。长期以来，这种合同困难被认为是收购的重要原因。为了评估这一动机在多大程度上导致并购，我们对目标公司在并购前后由同一主要发明人提交的专利进行了文本分析。我们发现，在并购完成后，目标公司发明人的专利相对于收购方发明人的专利，其专用性提高了28.9%至46.8%，这一结果是以目标公司提交的专利与一组反事实收购方为基准进行比较得出的。这种模式在可能需要专用性投资的纵向并购中更为显著。对于已宣布但未完成的并购，专利的专用性没有变化。总体而言，我们提供了实证证据，表明在激励专用性投资方面的合同问题可能是收购的一个动机。

29173.title: Innovation: Market Failures and Public Policies
29173.zh_title: 创新：市场失灵与公共政策
29173.authors: Kevin A. Bryan, Heidi L. Williams
29173.abstract: This is an invited chapter for the forthcoming Volume 4 of the Handbook of Industrial Organization. We summarize the state of the literature on the economics of innovation and highlight open policy questions. We first articulate the key market failures in markets for innovation, and then discuss how both scientific norms and market-oriented policies help overcome those market failures. We close by discussing recent work on the diffusion of inventions as well as on the links between innovation and inequality.
29173.zh_abstract: 这是为即将出版的《产业组织手册》第4卷撰写的一章。我们总结了创新经济学文献的现状，并强调了尚未解决的政策问题。我们首先阐述了创新市场中关键的市场失灵，然后讨论了科学规范和市场导向政策如何帮助克服这些市场失灵。最后，我们讨论了关于发明扩散以及创新与不平等之间联系的近期研究。

29172.title: The Economics of Walking About and Predicting Unemployment
29172.abstract: Unemployment is notoriously difficult to predict. In previous studies, once country fixed effects are added to panel estimates, few variables predict changes in unemployment rates. Using panel data for 29 European countries over 439 months between 1985 and 2021 in an unbalanced country*month panel of just over 10000 observations, we predict changes in the unemployment rate 12 months in advance based on individuals’ fears of unemployment, their perceptions of the economic situation and their own household financial situation. Fear of unemployment predicts subsequent changes in unemployment 12 months later in the presence of country fixed effects and lagged unemployment. Individuals’ perceptions of the economic situation in the country and their own household finances also predict unemployment 12 months later. Business sentiment (industry fear of unemployment) is also predictive of unemployment 12 months later. The findings underscore the importance of the “economics of walking about”. The implication is that these social survey data are informative in predicting economic downturns and should be used more extensively in forecasting. We also generate a 29 country-level annual panel on life satisfaction from 1985-2020 from the World Database of Happiness and show that the consumer level fear of unemployment variable lowers well-being over and above the negative impact of the unemployment rate itself. Qualitative survey metrics were able to predict the Great Recession and the economic slowdown in Europe just prior to the COVID19 pandemic.
29172.zh_abstract: 失业率历来难以预测。在以往的研究中，一旦在面板估计中加入国家固定效应，很少有变量能够预测失业率的变化。我们使用1985年至2021年间29个欧洲国家439个月的面板数据，构建了一个包含略超过10000个观测值的非平衡国家*月面板，基于个人对失业的恐惧、对经济形势的看法以及自身家庭财务状况，预测12个月后的失业率变化。在控制国家固定效应和滞后失业率的情况下，对失业的恐惧能够预测12个月后的失业率变化。个人对国家经济形势和自身家庭财务状况的看法也能预测12个月后的失业率。商业情绪（行业对失业的恐惧）同样能预测12个月后的失业率。这些发现强调了“行走经济学”的重要性。其含义是，这些社会调查数据在预测经济衰退方面具有信息价值，应在预测中更广泛地使用。我们还从世界幸福数据库生成了1985-2020年29个国家的年度生活满意度面板数据，并表明消费者层面的失业恐惧变量会降低幸福感，其影响超过了失业率本身的负面效应。定性调查指标能够预测大衰退以及COVID-19大流行前夕欧洲的经济放缓。

29171.title: Central Bank Digital Currency in Historical Perspective: Another Crossroad in Monetary History
29171.zh_title: 历史视角下的中央银行数字货币：货币史上的又一个十字路口
29171.abstract: Digitalization of Money is a crossroad in monetary history. Advances in technology has led to the development of new forms of money: virtual (crypto) currencies like bitcoin; stable coins like libra/diem; and central bank digital currencies (CBDC) like the Bahamian sand dollar. These innovations in money and finance have resonance to earlier shifts in monetary history: 1) The shift in the eighteenth and nineteenth century from commodity money (gold and silver coins) to convertible fiduciary money and inconvertible fiat money; 2) the shift in the nineteenth and twentieth centuries from central bank notes to a central bank monopoly; 3) Then evolution since the seventeenth century of central banks and the tools of monetary policy. \n\nThis paper analyzes the arguments for a CBDC through the lens of monetary history. The bottom line is that the history of transformations in monetary systems suggests that technical change in money is inevitably driven by the financial incentives of a market economy. Government has always had a key role in the provision of outside money, which is a public good. Government has also regulated inside money provided by the private sector. This held for fiduciary money and will likely hold for digital money. CBDC could make monetary policy more efficient, and it could transform the international monetary and payments systems.
29171.zh_abstract: 货币数字化是货币史上的一个十字路口。技术进步导致了新货币形式的发展：虚拟（加密）货币如比特币；稳定币如Libra/Diem；以及中央银行数字货币（CBDC）如巴哈马沙元。这些货币和金融领域的创新与货币史上早期的转变有共鸣之处：1）18和19世纪从商品货币（金币和银币）向可兑换信用货币和不可兑换法定货币的转变；2）19和20世纪从中央银行纸币向中央银行垄断的转变；3）自17世纪以来中央银行及货币政策工具的演变。本文通过货币史的视角分析支持CBDC的论点。底线是，货币体系转型的历史表明，货币的技术变革不可避免地由市场经济的金融激励驱动。政府在提供外部货币（一种公共品）方面始终扮演着关键角色。政府也对私人部门提供的内部货币进行监管。这适用于信用货币，也可能适用于数字货币。CBDC可以使货币政策更有效率，并可能改变国际货币和支付体系。

29170.title: Visualization, Identification, and Estimation in the Linear Panel Event-Study Design
29170.zh_title: 线性面板事件研究设计中的可视化、识别与估计
29170.authors: Simon Freyaldenhoven, Christian Hansen, Jorge Pérez Pérez, Jesse M. Shapiro
29170.abstract: Linear panel models, and the “event-study plots” that often accompany them, are popular tools for learning about policy effects. We discuss the construction of event-study plots and suggest ways to make them more informative. We examine the economic content of different possible identifying assumptions. We explore the performance of the corresponding estimators in simulations, highlighting that a given estimator can perform well or poorly depending on the economic environment. An accompanying Stata package, xtevent, facilitates adoption of our suggestions.
29170.zh_abstract: 线性面板模型及其常伴随的“事件研究图”是了解政策效应的流行工具。我们讨论了事件研究图的构建，并提出了使其更具信息量的方法。我们审视了不同可能识别假设的经济内涵。我们通过模拟探索了相应估计量的表现，强调特定估计量的表现好坏取决于经济环境。配套的Stata软件包xtevent有助于采纳我们的建议。

29169.title: Competition and Selection in Credit Markets
29169.zh_title: 信贷市场中的竞争与筛选
29169.abstract: Screening in consumer credit markets is often associated with large fixed costs. We present both theory and evidence that, when lenders use fixed-cost technologies to screen borrowers, increased competition may increase rather than decrease interest rates in subprime consumer credit markets. In more competitive markets, lenders have lower market shares, and thus lower incentives to invest in screening. Thus, when markets are competitive, all lenders face a riskier pool of borrowers, which can lead interest rates to be higher. We provide evidence for the model’s predictions in the auto loan market using administrative credit panel data.
29169.zh_abstract: 消费者信贷市场中的筛选通常与高固定成本相关。我们提出理论和证据表明，当贷款人使用固定成本技术筛选借款人时，竞争加剧可能提高而非降低次级消费者信贷市场的利率。在竞争更激烈的市场中，贷款人市场份额较低，因此投资于筛选的激励也较低。因此，当市场竞争激烈时，所有贷款人都面临风险更高的借款人池，这可能导致利率上升。我们利用行政信贷面板数据为汽车贷款市场中模型的预测提供了证据。
29169.meta: Programs：CF, IO, PE, PR；JEL：D14, D4, G20, G21, G5, L62

29168.title: Misperceptions about Others
29168.abstract: People’s perceptions about others play an important role in shaping their own attitudes and behaviors, as well as social norms more broadly. This review presents a meta-analysis of the recent empirical literature that examines perceptions about others in the field. We document a number of stylized facts. Misperceptions about others are widespread, asymmetric, much larger when about out-group members, and positively associated with one’s own attitudes. Experimental treatments to re-calibrate misperceptions generally work as intended; they sometimes lead to meaningful changes in behaviors, though this often occurs only immediately after the treatments. We discuss different conceptual frameworks that could explain the origin, persistence, and rigidity of misperceptions about others. We point to several directions for future research.
29168.zh_abstract: 人们对他人的看法在塑造自身态度和行为以及更广泛的社会规范方面发挥着重要作用。本综述对近期关于实地环境中他人看法的实证文献进行了元分析。我们记录了一些典型事实：对他人的误解普遍存在、具有不对称性、在涉及外群体成员时更为严重，并且与自身态度正相关。旨在纠正误解的实验性处理通常按预期发挥作用；它们有时会导致行为的有意义变化，尽管这通常仅发生在处理之后。我们讨论了可能解释他人误解的起源、持续性和僵化性的不同概念框架。我们指出了未来研究的几个方向。

29167.title: (Successful) Democracies Breed Their Own Support
29167.zh_title: （成功的）民主制度孕育自身支持
29167.authors: Daron Acemoglu, Nicolás Ajzenman, Cevat Giray Aksoy, Martin Fiszbein, Carlos A. Molina
29167.abstract: Using large-scale survey data covering more than 110 countries and exploiting within-country variation across cohorts and surveys, we show that individuals with longer exposure to democracy display stronger support for democratic institutions. We bolster these baseline findings using an instrumental-variables strategy exploiting regional democratization waves and focusing on immigrants’ exposure to democracy before migration. In all cases, the timing and nature of the effects are consistent with a causal interpretation. We also establish that democracies breed their own support only when they are successful: all of the effects we estimate work through exposure to democracies that are successful in providing economic growth, peace and political stability, and public goods.
29167.zh_abstract: 利用覆盖110多个国家的大规模调查数据，并利用不同队列和调查中的国家内部变异，我们表明，民主制度暴露时间更长的个体对民主制度表现出更强的支持。我们通过使用区域民主化浪潮的工具变量策略，并关注移民在迁移前对民主的暴露，加强了这些基线发现。在所有情况下，效应的时机和性质都与因果解释一致。我们还确定，民主制度只有在成功时才能孕育自身支持：我们估计的所有效应都通过暴露于在提供经济增长、和平与政治稳定以及公共产品方面成功的民主制度而起作用。

29166.title: Demand Shocks and Supply Chain Resilience: An Agent Based Modelling Approach and Application to the Potato Supply Chain
29166.zh_title: 需求冲击与供应链韧性：基于主体建模方法及其在土豆供应链中的应用
29166.authors: Liang Lu, Ruby Nguyen, Md Mamunur Rahman, Jason Winfree
29166.abstract: The food supply chain has experienced major disruptions from both demand and supply sides during the Covid-19 pandemic. While some consequences such as food waste are directly caused by the disruption due to supply chain inefficiency, others are indirectly caused by a change in consumer’s preferences. As a result, evaluating food supply chain resilience is a difficult task. With an attempt to understand impacts of demand on the food supply chain, we developed an agent-based model based on the case of Idaho’s potato supply chain. Results showed that not only the magnitude but also the timing of the demand shock will have different impacts on various stakeholders of the supply chain. Our contribution to the literature is two-fold. First, the model helps explain why food waste and shortages may occur with dramatic shifts in consumer demand. Second, this paper provides a new angle on evaluating the various mitigation strategies and policy responses to disruptions beyond Covid-19.
29166.zh_abstract: 在新冠疫情期间，食品供应链经历了来自需求和供给两方面的重大中断。虽然一些后果（如食物浪费）直接由供应链低效导致的中断引起，但其他后果则间接由消费者偏好的变化引起。因此，评估食品供应链韧性是一项艰巨的任务。为了理解需求对食品供应链的影响，我们基于爱达荷州土豆供应链案例开发了一个基于主体的模型。结果表明，不仅需求冲击的幅度，而且其时机都会对供应链的不同利益相关者产生不同影响。我们对文献的贡献有两方面。首先，该模型有助于解释为什么消费者需求的剧烈变化可能导致食物浪费和短缺。其次，本文为评估超越新冠疫情的中断的各种缓解策略和政策应对提供了新视角。

29165.title: The Elusive Explanation for the Declining Labor Share
29165.zh_title: 劳动份额下降的难以捉摸的解释
29165.abstract: A vast literature seeks to measure and explain the apparent decline in the labor share in national income that has occurred in recent times in the United States and elsewhere. The culprits include technological change, increased globalization and the rise of China, the enhanced exercise of market power by large firms in concentrated product markets, the decline in unionization rates and the erosion in the bargaining power of workers in labor markets, and the changing composition of the workforce due to a slowdown in population growth and a rise in educational attainment. We review this literature, with special emphasis on the pitfalls associated with using cross-sectional data to assess this phenomenon and the reasons why the body of papers collectively explains the phenomenon many times over.
29165.zh_abstract: 大量文献试图衡量和解释近期美国及其他地区国民收入中劳动份额的明显下降。罪魁祸首包括技术变革、全球化加剧和中国的崛起、集中产品市场中大企业市场势力的增强、工会化率的下降和劳动力市场中工人议价能力的侵蚀，以及由于人口增长放缓和教育程度提高导致的劳动力构成变化。我们回顾了这些文献，特别强调了使用横截面数据评估这一现象的陷阱，以及为何这些论文整体上多次解释了这一现象的原因。

29164.title: Exchange Rate Volatility and Global Food Supply Chains
29164.zh_title: 汇率波动与全球食品供应链
29164.abstract: This paper analyzes the impact of exchange rate risk on global food supply chains. Although the theoretical literature suggests ambivalence regarding the sign and magnitude of this effect, most empirical studies indicate a negative association between exchange rate volatility and international trade flows. I contribute to the ongoing debate by investigating the relationship at the product-level using a sectoral gravity model and relying on detailed retrospective trade and exchange rate data for a balanced panel of 159 countries for 2001 to 2017. I study the relationship for 781 agricultural and food products and estimate the trade effects of short-run and long-run exchange rate volatility. My findings indicate significant heterogeneity in the trade effects of exchange rate risk. While the mean trade effects are positive for short-run and long-run volatility, these effects vary substantially according to product and industry characteristics. I find a positive association between exchange rate volatility and the trade effects for upstreamness and a negative association for downstreamness of the traded products. I show that the significant and adverse trade effects in earlier studies result from model misspecification and measurement errors. This research enhances the understanding of the implications of exchange rate volatility which is a primary source of international risk exposure for global food supply chains.
29164.zh_abstract: 本文分析了汇率风险对全球食品供应链的影响。尽管理论文献表明对此效应的符号和大小存在矛盾，但大多数实证研究表明汇率波动性与国际贸易流量之间存在负相关关系。我通过使用部门引力模型在产品层面研究这种关系，并依赖2001年至2017年159个国家的平衡面板的详细回溯贸易和汇率数据，为正在进行的辩论做出贡献。我研究了781种农业和食品产品的关系，并估计了短期和长期汇率波动的贸易效应。我的发现表明汇率风险的贸易效应存在显著的异质性。虽然短期和长期波动的平均贸易效应为正，但这些效应根据产品和行业特征而有很大差异。我发现汇率波动性与上游度产品的贸易效应之间存在正相关关系，与下游度产品的贸易效应之间存在负相关关系。我表明，早期研究中显著的不利贸易效应源于模型设定错误和测量误差。本研究增强了对汇率波动影响的理解，汇率波动是全球食品供应链国际风险暴露的主要来源。

29163.title: Bureaucracy and Development
29163.authors: Timothy J. Besley, Robin Burgess, Adnan Khan, Guo Xu
29163.abstract: In recent years, there has been increasing interest in whether and how bureaucratic effectiveness contributes to development. Just what makes for an effective bureaucracy and what are the building blocks of state capacity remain subject to debate. This paper reviews the arguments connecting contemporary research using administrative data and field experiments to wider discussions of the origins of state capacity. Most current research has been focused on understanding specific features of the environment in which bureaucrats operate. We connect this to discussions of bureaucratic systems, specifically the relationship to politics, citizens, firms and NGOs.
29163.zh_abstract: 近年来，人们越来越关注官僚机构有效性是否以及如何促进发展。什么构成有效的官僚机构以及国家能力的基石是什么，仍然存在争议。本文回顾了将使用行政数据和实地实验的当代研究与关于国家能力起源的更广泛讨论联系起来的论点。当前大多数研究集中于理解官僚运作环境的具体特征。我们将此与关于官僚体系的讨论联系起来，特别是与政治、公民、企业和非政府组织的关系。
29163.meta: Programs：DEV, POL；JEL：D72, D73, H83, O11, O12

29162.title: Ageing and Welfare-State Policy Making: Macroeconomic Perspective
29162.zh_title: 老龄化与福利国家政策制定：宏观经济学视角
29162.abstract: It has been well recognized that population ageing could generate structural changes centered around the dwindling labor force, on one hand, and the expanding dependency on the generosity of the welfare state, on the other hand. Ageing-related welfare state policy entails both fiscal issues and migration issues. The paper employs a general-equilibrium model with a policy-making focus, to help understand the mechanism governing the provision of social benefits, labor income taxation, capital income taxation, migration curbs on low skilled and high skilled, driven by the ageing of the population. Greater generosity of the welfare state comes together with policy of a more liberal migration policy — incentive compatible with the interests of the majority voters.
29162.zh_abstract: 人们普遍认识到，人口老龄化可能引发结构性变化，一方面表现为劳动力萎缩，另一方面则是对福利国家慷慨程度的依赖日益扩大。与老龄化相关的福利国家政策既涉及财政问题，也涉及移民问题。本文采用一个以政策制定为重点的一般均衡模型，旨在帮助理解由人口老龄化驱动的社会福利供给、劳动收入税、资本收入税、对低技能和高技能移民的限制等政策的运行机制。福利国家慷慨程度的提高伴随着更自由的移民政策——这与多数选民的利益激励相容。

29199.title: Is that Really a Kuznets Curve? Turning Points for Income Inequality in China
29199.zh_title: 那真的是库兹涅茨曲线吗？中国收入不平等的转折点
29199.abstract: The path of income inequality in post-reform China has been widely interpreted as “China’s Kuznets curve.” We show that the Kuznets growth model of structural transformation in a dual economy, alongside population urbanization, has little explanatory power for our new series of inequality measures back to 1981. Our simulations tracking the partial “Kuznets derivative” of inequality with respect to urban population share yield virtually no Kuznets curve. More plausible explanations for the inequality turning points relate to determinants of the gap between urban and rural mean incomes, including multiple agrarian policy reforms. Our findings warn against any presumption that the Kuznets process will assure that China has passed its time of rising inequality. More generally, our findings cast doubt on past arguments that economic growth through structural transformation in poor countries is necessarily inequality increasing, or that a turning point will eventually be reached after which that growth will be inequality decreasing.
29199.zh_abstract: 改革后中国收入不平等的路径被广泛解释为“中国的库兹涅茨曲线”。我们表明，二元经济中结构转型的库兹涅茨增长模型，连同人口城市化，对我们追溯到1981年的新不平等序列几乎没有解释力。我们的模拟追踪了不平等相对于城市人口份额的偏“库兹涅茨导数”，几乎没有产生库兹涅茨曲线。对不平等转折点更合理的解释与城乡平均收入差距的决定因素有关，包括多项农业政策改革。我们的发现警告不要假设库兹涅茨过程将确保中国已经度过了收入不平等上升的时期。更一般地说，我们的发现对过去的论点提出了质疑，即贫困国家通过结构转型的经济增长必然增加不平等，或者最终会达到一个转折点，之后这种增长将减少不平等。

29198.title: Income-Contingent Loans As an Unemployment Benefit
29198.zh_title: 作为失业救济金的收入或有贷款
29198.authors: Haaris Mateen, Joseph E. Stiglitz, Jungyoll Yun
29198.abstract: Imperfections in risk and capital markets imply that individuals who lose jobs suffer from imperfect smoothing of consumption across states and times. Compared to the first best, there will be too little search. Optimal unemployment programs, which balance the marginal benefit of consumption smoothing vs. the marginal cost of the insurance externality, increase welfare and may even increase GDP. Our analytical results suggest that welfare is higher if the unemployment benefits program includes income-contingent unemployment loans (ICL), where the amount repaid depends on the individual’s future income. Such loans can be financed by a risk premium imposed on the unemployed who avail themselves of the loans, and partially substitute for unemployment insurance (UI) benefits. Optimal unemployment benefits programs (UB) with ICL do a better job of smoothing consumption across states and time, and in particular total benefits when unemployed increase. We analyze how changes in key parameters, such as the degree of risk aversion and the nature of post-employment work, affect the design of the optimal UB program and the magnitude of the incremental benefits from including income-contingent loans.
29198.zh_abstract: 风险市场和资本市场的不完善意味着失业者无法在状态和时间上完美平滑消费。与最优情况相比，将导致搜索不足。最优失业计划平衡消费平滑的边际收益与保险外部性的边际成本，能提高福利甚至可能增加GDP。我们的分析结果表明，如果失业救济金计划包括收入或有失业贷款（ICL），其中偿还金额取决于个人未来收入，则福利更高。此类贷款可以通过向使用贷款的失业者征收风险溢价来融资，并部分替代失业保险（UI）福利。包含ICL的最优失业救济金计划（UB）能更好地在状态和时间上平滑消费，特别是失业时的总福利增加。我们分析了关键参数的变化，如风险厌恶程度和就业后工作的性质，如何影响最优UB计划的设计以及包含收入或有贷款的增量福利大小。
29198.meta: Programs：LS, PE；JEL：D15, H53, H81, I38, J64, J65

29197.title: Sovereign Spreads and the Political Leaning of Nations
29197.zh_title: 主权利差与国家的政治倾向
29197.authors: Ionut Cotoc, Alok Johri, César Sosa-Padilla
29197.abstract: Nations with a higher propensity to elect left governments tend to pay higher and more volatile sovereign spreads. We build a sovereign default model with elections between left and right policymakers. Reelection probabilities increase with government spending, with the left having a small advantage (consistent with the data). We use variation in “election efficiency” to create model economies that elect the left more (left-leaning) or less frequently (right-leaning) in equilibrium. The left-leaning economy has a higher reluctance for fiscal austerity than the right-leaning economy, chooses higher government spending, and faces higher spreads, resulting in lower welfare.
29197.zh_abstract: 更倾向于选举左翼政府的国家往往支付更高且更波动的主权利差。我们构建了一个包含左翼和右翼政策制定者选举的主权违约模型。连任概率随政府支出增加而增加，左翼具有微小优势（与数据一致）。我们利用“选举效率”的变化来创建在均衡中更频繁选举左翼（左倾）或更不频繁选举右翼（右倾）的模型经济体。左倾经济体比右倾经济体更不愿实施财政紧缩，选择更高的政府支出，面临更高的利差，从而导致更低的福利。

29196.title: Opposing firm-level Responses to the China Shock: Horizontal Competition Versus Vertical Relationships?
29196.zh_title: 对中国冲击的相反企业层面反应：横向竞争还是纵向关系？
29196.authors: Philippe Aghion, Antonin Bergeaud, Matthieu Lequien, Marc Melitz, Thomas Zuber
29196.abstract: We decompose the “China shock” into two components that induce different adjustments for firms exposed to Chinese exports: an output shock affecting firms selling goods that compete with similar imported Chinese goods, and an input supply shock affecting firms using inputs similar to the imported Chinese goods. Combining French accounting, customs, and patent information at the firm-level, we show that the output shock is detrimental to firms’ sales, employment and innovation. Moreover, this negative impact is concentrated on low-productivity firms. By contrast, we find a positive effect - although often not significant - of the input supply shock on firms’ sales, employment and innovation.
29196.zh_abstract: 我们将“中国冲击”分解为两个组成部分，它们对面临中国出口的企业引发不同的调整：一个产出冲击，影响销售与类似进口中国商品竞争的商品的企业；一个投入供给冲击，影响使用与进口中国商品类似投入的企业。结合法国企业层面的会计、海关和专利信息，我们表明产出冲击对企业的销售、就业和创新是有害的。此外，这种负面影响集中在低生产率企业上。相比之下，我们发现投入供给冲击对企业销售、就业和创新有积极影响——尽管通常不显著。

29195.title: When Uncertainty and Volatility Are Disconnected: Implications for Asset Pricing and Portfolio Performance
29195.zh_title: 当不确定性与波动性脱节时：对资产定价和投资组合绩效的影响
29195.authors: Yacine Aït-Sahalia, Felix Matthys, Emilio Osambela, Ronnie Sircar
29195.abstract: We analyze an environment where the uncertainty in the equity market return and its volatility are both stochastic, and may be potentially disconnected. We solve a representative investor's optimal asset allocation and derive the resulting conditional equity premium and risk-free rate in equilibrium. Our empirical analysis shows that the equity premium appears to be earned for facing uncertainty, especially high uncertainty that is disconnected from lower volatility, rather than for facing volatility as traditionally assumed. Incorporating the possibility of a disconnect between volatility and uncertainty significantly improves portfolio performance, over and above the performance obtained by conditioning on volatility only.
29195.zh_abstract: 我们分析了一个环境，其中股票市场回报的不确定性及其波动性都是随机的，并且可能脱节。我们求解了代表性投资者的最优资产配置，并推导出均衡中的条件性股权溢价和无风险利率。我们的实证分析表明，股权溢价似乎是为了面对不确定性而获得的，特别是与较低波动性脱节的高不确定性，而不是像传统假设的那样为了面对波动性。纳入波动性与不确定性之间脱节的可能性显著改善了投资组合绩效，超过了仅以波动性为条件的绩效。

29194.title: Global Agricultural Value Chains and Structural Transformation
29194.zh_title: 全球农业价值链与结构转型
29194.abstract: Since the mid-1900s, agricultural global value chains (AGVCs) have grown rapidly and transformed the nature of agri-food production around the world. Little is known, however, about how participation in AGVCs changes the structure of participating economies. Using a constructed panel dataset from 155 countries for the period 1991-2015, I find that, in response to high AGVC participation, both GDP and employment shares in the agricultural and services sectors increase, and that both factors decrease in the manufacturing sector. Counter to conventional wisdom about structural transformation, I uncover evidence that modern agrarian economies are leapfrogging the manufacturing sector to directly develop their agriculture and services sectors through their participation in AGVCs.
29194.zh_abstract: 自20世纪中期以来，农业全球价值链（AGVCs）迅速发展，并改变了全球农业食品生产的性质。然而，关于参与AGVCs如何改变参与经济体的结构，人们知之甚少。利用1991-2015年期间155个国家的面板数据集，我发现，面对较高的AGVC参与度，农业和服务业的GDP和就业份额均有所增加，而制造业的这两个因素均有所下降。与传统结构转型观点相反，我发现了证据表明，现代农业经济体正在跳过制造业部门，通过参与AGVCs直接发展其农业和服务业部门。

29193.title: Interest Rate Cuts vs. Stimulus Payments: An Equivalence Result
29193.zh_title: 降息与刺激支付：一个等价性结果
29193.abstract: In a textbook New Keynesian model extended to allow for uninsurable household income risk, any path of inflation and output implementable via interest rate policy is similarly implementable through uniform lump-sum transfers ("stimulus checks"). A dual-mandate policymaker can thus use checks to perfectly substitute for conventional monetary policy when rates are constrained by a lower bound. In a quantitative heterogeneous-agent (HANK) model, the stimulus check policy that implements a given monetary allocation is well-characterized by a small number of measurable sufficient statistics. In the household cross-section, the transfer policy is associated with lower consumption inequality than the equivalent rate cut.
29193.zh_abstract: 在一个扩展到包含不可保险家庭收入风险的教科书式新凯恩斯模型中，任何可通过利率政策实现的通胀和产出路径，同样可以通过统一的总额转移支付（“刺激支票”）来实现。因此，当利率受到下限约束时，双重使命的政策制定者可以使用刺激支票完美替代传统货币政策。在一个量化的异质性主体（HANK）模型中，实施给定货币配置的刺激支票政策，可以通过少量可测量的充分统计量很好地刻画。在家庭横截面中，转移支付政策与等效的降息相比，与更低的消费不平等相关。

29192.title: Using Household Rosters from Survey Data to Estimate All-cause Mortality during COVID in India
29192.zh_title: 利用调查数据中的家庭名册估算印度新冠期间的全因死亡率
29192.abstract: Official statistics on deaths due to COVID undercount deaths due to lack of testing. In developed countries, death registries have been used to measure total excess death during the pandemic. However, very few developing countries have even partial death registries or the capacity to register deaths during a pandemic. In this paper we estimate excess deaths in India using the member roster of a large and representative household panel survey. We estimate roughly 6.3 million excess deaths during the pandemic through August 2021. We cannot demonstrate causality between COVID and deaths but the timing and age structure of deaths is consistent with the COVID pandemic and excess deaths are positively correlated with reported infections. Finally, we find that excess deaths were higher among higher-income persons and were negatively associated with mobility. The methods in this paper can be used in countries with a household panel to measure health-related demographic indicators.
29192.zh_abstract: 由于缺乏检测，官方新冠死亡统计数据低估了死亡人数。在发达国家，死亡登记系统已被用于衡量疫情期间的总超额死亡人数。然而，很少有发展中国家拥有哪怕是部分的死亡登记系统，或在疫情期间登记死亡的能力。在本文中，我们利用一个大型且具有代表性的家庭面板调查的成员名册，估算了印度的超额死亡人数。我们估计，在疫情期间至2021年8月，大约有630万超额死亡。我们无法证明新冠与死亡之间的因果关系，但死亡的时间点和年龄结构与新冠疫情一致，且超额死亡与报告的感染人数呈正相关。最后，我们发现，高收入人群的超额死亡更高，且与流动性呈负相关。本文的方法可用于拥有家庭面板的国家，以衡量与健康相关的人口统计指标。

29191.title: How Economic Development Influences the Environment
29191.zh_title: 经济发展如何影响环境
29191.abstract: Reducing global poverty and addressing climate change and other environmental crises are among the most important challenges facing humanity today. This review article discusses one way in which these problems are intertwined: economic development affects the environment. I synthesize recent microempirical research on the environmental effects of economic development in low- and middle-income countries. The studies that I discuss identify the causal effects of specific aspects of economic development such as greater household purchasing power, expanded access to credit, more secure property rights, technological progress, and stronger regulatory capacity. I conclude by outlining some gaps in the literature.
29191.zh_abstract: 减少全球贫困以及应对气候变化和其他环境危机，是当今人类面临的最重要挑战之一。这篇综述文章讨论了这些问题相互交织的一个方面：经济发展影响环境。我综合了近期关于中低收入国家经济发展环境影响的微观实证研究。我所讨论的研究识别了经济发展特定方面的因果效应，例如更高的家庭购买力、更广泛的信贷获取、更安全的产权、技术进步以及更强的监管能力。最后，我概述了文献中的一些空白。

29190.title: Do Central Banks Rebalance Their Currency Shares?
29190.zh_title: 中央银行会重新平衡其货币份额吗？
29190.authors: Menzie D. Chinn, Hiro Ito, Robert N. McCauley
29190.abstract: Do central banks rebalance their currency shares? The answer matters because the dollar’s predominant role in large official reserve holdings means that widespread rebalancing requires central banks to buy (sell) a depreciating (appreciating) dollar, stabilising its value against other major currencies. We hypothesise that larger reserve holdings have led central banks to approach their investment more systematically and to make rebalancing in the face of exchange rate changes the norm. We illustrate the choice with two polar case studies: the US clearly does not rebalance its small FX reserves; Switzerland does rebalance its very large reserves, so that changes in exchange rates do not move its currency allocation. Our hypothesis finds partial support in global aggregated data. They reject both no rebalancing and full rebalancing and point to emerging market economies as the source of the aggregate result. We also test for rebalancing with panel data and find that our sample economies on average again behave in intermediate fashion, partially but not fully rebalancing. However, when observations are weighted by the size of reserves, the panel analysis finds full rebalancing. A variety of control variables and splits of the panel sample do not alter the thrust of these findings. Central banks rebalance their FX reserves extensively but not uniformly.
29190.zh_abstract: 中央银行会重新平衡其货币份额吗？这个问题的答案很重要，因为美元在大型官方储备持有中的主导地位意味着，广泛的再平衡要求中央银行买入（卖出）贬值（升值）的美元，从而稳定其相对于其他主要货币的价值。我们假设，更大的储备持有量导致中央银行更系统地对待其投资，并使面对汇率变化进行再平衡成为常态。我们通过两个极端的案例研究来说明这一选择：美国显然没有对其少量的外汇储备进行再平衡；瑞士则对其非常大的储备进行了再平衡，因此汇率变化不会改变其货币配置。我们的假设在全球汇总数据中得到了部分支持。这些数据既拒绝了无再平衡，也拒绝了完全再平衡，并指出新兴市场经济体是汇总结果的来源。我们还使用面板数据检验了再平衡，发现我们的样本经济体平均而言再次表现出中间行为，即部分但非完全再平衡。然而，当观测值按储备规模加权时，面板分析发现了完全再平衡。各种控制变量和面板样本的分割并未改变这些发现的主旨。中央银行广泛但非统一地对其外汇储备进行再平衡。

29189.title: Young Firms, Old Capital
29189.authors: Song Ma, Justin Murfin, Ryan D. Pratt
29189.abstract: Across a broad range of equipment types and industries, we document a pattern of local capital reallocation from older firms to younger firms. Start-ups purchase a disproportionate share of old physical capital previously owned by more mature firms. The evidence is consistent with financial constraints driving differential demand for vintage capital. The local supply of used capital influences start-up entry, job creation, investment choices, and growth, particularly when capital is immobile. Conversely, incumbents accelerate capital replacement in the presence of more young firms. The evidence suggests previously undocumented benefits to co-location between old and young firms.
29189.zh_abstract: 在广泛的设备类型和行业中，我们记录了资本从老企业向年轻企业进行本地重新配置的模式。初创企业购买了不成比例的大量先前由更成熟企业拥有的旧实物资本。证据与金融约束驱动对旧资本品差异化需求的观点一致。当地二手资本的供应影响初创企业的进入、就业创造、投资选择和增长，尤其是在资本不可流动的情况下。相反，在存在更多年轻企业的情况下，现有企业会加速资本更新。证据表明，老企业和年轻企业之间共同选址存在此前未被记录的好处。
29189.meta: Programs：CF, IO, PR；JEL：G3, L2, R1, R4

29188.title: The Consumption, Income, and Well-Being of Single Mother Headed Families 25 Years After Welfare Reform
29188.zh_title: 福利改革25年后单亲母亲家庭的消费、收入和福祉
29188.authors: Jeehoon Han, Bruce D. Meyer, James X. Sullivan
29188.abstract: We investigate how material well-being has changed over time for single mother headed families—the primary group affected by welfare reform and other policy changes of the 1990s. We focus on consumption as well as other indicators including components of consumption, measures of housing quality, and health insurance coverage. The results provide strong evidence that the material circumstances of single mothers improved in the decades following welfare reform. The consumption of the most disadvantaged single mother headed families—those with low consumption or low education—rose noticeably over time and at a faster rate than for those in comparison groups.
29188.zh_abstract: 我们调查了单亲母亲家庭（受1990年代福利改革和其他政策变化影响的主要群体）的物质福祉随时间的变化情况。我们关注消费以及其他指标，包括消费的组成部分、住房质量指标和健康保险覆盖范围。结果提供了强有力的证据，表明单亲母亲的物质状况在福利改革后的几十年里有所改善。最弱势的单亲母亲家庭——那些消费低或教育水平低的家庭——的消费随时间显著上升，且增长速度高于对照组家庭。
29188.meta: Programs：CH, EH, LS, PE；JEL：D12, D31, I31, I32, I38

29187.title: Job Displacement and Job Mobility: The Role of Joblessness
29187.zh_title: 工作置换与工作流动性：失业的作用
29187.authors: Bruce Fallick, John C. Haltiwanger, Erika McEntarfer, Matthew Staiger
29187.abstract: Who is harmed by and who benefits from worker reallocation? We investigate the earnings consequences of changing jobs and find a wide dispersion in outcomes. This dispersion is driven not by whether the worker was displaced, but by the duration of joblessness between job spells. Job movers who experience joblessness suffer a persistent reduction in earnings and tend to move to lower-paying firms, suggesting that job ladder models offer a useful lens through which to understand the negative consequences of job separations.
29187.zh_abstract: 谁因工人重新配置而受损，谁又从中受益？我们调查了换工作的收入后果，并发现了结果的广泛离散性。这种离散性并非由工人是否被置换所驱动，而是由工作间隔期间的失业持续时间所驱动。经历失业的工作流动者会遭受持续的收入下降，并倾向于流向支付更低的公司，这表明工作阶梯模型为理解工作分离的负面后果提供了一个有用的视角。

29186.title: The Virus, Vaccination, and Voting
29186.abstract: Vaccination rates have a statistically significant downward effect on the Covid-19 death rate across US counties, as of August 12, 2021. Controlling for poverty rates, age, and temperature lowers the magnitude of the estimate a little. Using the Biden-Trump vote in the 2020 election as an instrument for vaccination rates raises the magnitude of the estimate. Presumably it corrects for a positive effect of observed local Covid deaths on the decision to get vaccinated. Overall, the estimated beneficial effect holds up and has risen over time.
29186.zh_abstract: 截至2021年8月12日，美国各县的疫苗接种率对新冠肺炎死亡率具有统计上显著的下降效应。控制贫困率、年龄和温度后，估计值的幅度略有降低。使用2020年大选中拜登与特朗普的投票率作为疫苗接种率的工具变量，提高了估计值的幅度。这大概纠正了观察到的当地新冠肺炎死亡人数对接种疫苗决策的正向影响。总体而言，估计的有益效应是稳健的，并且随着时间的推移而增强。

29185.title: The Value of Statistical Life: A Meta-analysis of Meta-analyses
29185.zh_title: 统计生命价值：一项元分析的元分析
29185.abstract: The Value of Statistical Life (VSL) is arguably the most important number in benefit-cost analyses of environmental, health, and transportation policies. However, agencies have used a wide range of VSL values. One reason may be the embarrassment of riches when it comes to VSL studies. While meta-analysis is a standard way to synthesize information across studies, we now have multiple competing meta-analyses and reviews. Thus, to analysts, picking one such meta-analysis may feel as hard as picking a single "best study." This paper responds by taking the meta-analysis another step, estimating a meta-analysis (or mixture distribution) of six meta-analyses. The baseline model yields a central VSL of $\$7.0$m, with a 90% confidence interval of $\$2.4$m to $\$11.2$m. The provided code allows users to easily change subjective weights on the studies, add new studies, or change adjustments for income, inflation, and latency.
29185.zh_abstract: 统计生命价值（VSL）可以说是环境、健康和交通政策成本效益分析中最重要的数字。然而，各机构使用的VSL值范围很广。一个原因可能是VSL研究数量过多。虽然元分析是综合各项研究信息的标准方法，但我们现在有多个相互竞争的元分析和综述。因此，对于分析人员来说，选择其中一个元分析可能和选择单个“最佳研究”一样困难。本文通过将元分析再推进一步，对六项元分析进行元分析（或混合分布）来回应这一问题。基准模型得出的中心VSL为700万美元，90%置信区间为240万至1120万美元。提供的代码允许用户轻松更改对各项研究的主观权重、添加新研究，或调整收入、通货膨胀和潜伏期的影响。
29185.meta: Programs：EEE；JEL：I12, I18, J17, J31, K32, Q51

29184.title: Errors in Reporting and Imputation of Government Benefits and Their Implications
29184.zh_title: 政府福利报告与插补中的错误及其影响
29184.authors: Pablo A. Celhay, Bruce D. Meyer, Nikolas Mittag
29184.abstract: We document the extent, nature, and consequences of survey errors in cash welfare and SNAP receipt in three major U.S. household surveys. We find high rates of misreporting, particularly failure to report receipt. The surveys inaccurately capture patterns of multiple program participation, even though there is little evidence of program confusion. Error rates are higher among imputed observations, which account for a large share of false positive errors. Many household characteristics have significant effects on both false positives and false negative errors. Error rates sharply differ by race, ethnicity, income and other household characteristics. The errors greatly affect models of program receipt and estimated effects of income and race are noticeably biased. We examine error due to item non-response and imputation, as well as whether imputation improves estimates. Item non-respondents have higher receipt rates than the population conditional on covariates. The assumptions for consistent estimates in multivariate models fail both when excluding item non-respondents and when using the imputed values. In binary choice models of program receipt, linked data estimates favor excluding item non-respondents rather than using imputed values. Biases are well predicted by the error patterns we document, helping researchers make informed decisions on whether to use imputed values.
29184.zh_abstract: 我们记录了美国三项主要家庭调查中现金福利和SNAP领取情况的调查错误的程度、性质和后果。我们发现误报率很高，特别是未报告领取情况。这些调查未能准确捕捉多重项目参与的模式，尽管几乎没有证据表明存在项目混淆。插补观测值的错误率更高，这占了假阳性错误的大部分。许多家庭特征对假阳性和假阴性错误都有显著影响。错误率因种族、民族、收入和其他家庭特征而显著不同。这些错误极大地影响了项目领取模型，并且收入和种族的估计效应明显存在偏差。我们考察了因项目无回答和插补导致的错误，以及插补是否改善了估计。在给定协变量的条件下，项目无回答者的领取率高于总体人口。在排除项目无回答者和使用插补值时，多元模型中一致估计的假设均不成立。在项目领取的二项选择模型中，关联数据估计倾向于排除项目无回答者而非使用插补值。我们记录的错误模式很好地预测了偏差，这有助于研究人员就是否使用插补值做出明智的决定。
29184.meta: Programs：CH, LS, PE；JEL：C81, D31, I32, I38

29183.title: The Industrial Organization of Financial Markets
29183.authors: Robert Clark, Jean-François Houde, Jakub Kastl
29183.abstract: This chapter discusses recent developments in the literature involving applications of industrial organization methods to finance. We structure our discussion around a simple model of a financial intermediary that concentrates its attention either on (i) the retail market and hence engages in a traditional maturity transformation business by accepting funds that can be used to invest in risky projects (loans), or (ii) the investment business, financing its operations on the “wholesale” market and making markets or investing in higher return riskier projects. Our discussion is centered around the analysis of market structure and competition in each of these markets, focusing in turn on (i) primary and secondary markets for government and corporate debt, (ii) interbank loans, (iii) markets for retail funding, and (iv) credit markets, including mortgages.
29183.zh_abstract: 本章讨论了产业组织方法在金融领域应用的最新文献进展。我们围绕一个简单的金融中介模型来组织讨论，该中介将注意力集中在（i）零售市场，因此从事传统的期限转换业务，通过接受可用于投资风险项目（贷款）的资金，或（ii）投资业务，通过在“批发”市场为其运营融资，并在市场做市或投资于更高回报的风险项目。我们的讨论围绕这些市场中市场结构和竞争的分析展开，依次关注（i）政府和公司债券的一级和二级市场，（ii）银行间贷款，（iii）零售融资市场，以及（iv）信贷市场，包括抵押贷款。

29182.title: Eclipses and the Memory of Revolutions: Evidence from China
29182.zh_title: 日食与革命记忆：来自中国的证据
29182.authors: Meng Miao, Jacopo Ponticelli, Yi Shao
29182.abstract: Why are certain communities more prone to anti-government protests than others? Do past rebellions lead to more protests today? We study the historical roots of anti-government protests using the experience of China. We document that counties with higher incidence of peasant uprisings against local government oﬃcials during the Qing dynasty period (1644-1912) have a higher incidence of anti-government protests in present-day China. To generate plausibly exogenous variation in the incidence of past protests, we exploit diﬀerences in the visibility and magnitude of solar eclipses during the Qing dynasty period. In the Confucian tradition, solar eclipses are considered a negative divine signal on the legitimacy of the ruler, facilitating the coordination of protest actions. We test this mechanism using detailed data on the timing and location of anti-government rebellions extracted from local chronicles. Counties within the totality zone of a solar eclipse were signiﬁcantly more likely to experience a rebellion in the eclipse year. The persistent eﬀect of past protests is stronger in counties with temples and memorials celebrating early anti-Qing leaders. Diﬀerences in historical memories of past protests aﬀect communities’ reaction to current grievances against local governments. Communities with such memories are more likely to protest in response to higher levels of air pollution.
29182.zh_abstract: 为什么某些社区比其他社区更容易发生反政府抗议？过去的叛乱是否会导致今天更多的抗议？我们利用中国的经验研究反政府抗议的历史根源。我们记录了清朝时期（1644-1912）农民起义反对地方官员发生率较高的县，在当代中国反政府抗议的发生率也更高。为了生成过去抗议发生率的合理外生变异，我们利用了清朝时期日食可见度和规模的差异。在儒家传统中，日食被视为对统治者合法性的负面神谕，有助于协调抗议行动。我们利用从地方志中提取的关于反政府叛乱时间和地点的详细数据来检验这一机制。处于日全食带内的县在日食年份发生叛乱的可能性显著更高。过去抗议的持续效应在那些建有纪念早期反清领袖的庙宇和纪念碑的县更强。过去抗议的历史记忆差异会影响社区对当前地方政府不满的反应。拥有此类记忆的社区更有可能因空气污染水平升高而进行抗议。

29181.title: The Geography of Remote Work
29181.authors: Lukas Althoff, Fabian Eckert, Sharat Ganapati, Conor Walsh
29181.abstract: Big city economies specialize in business service industries whose workers’ local spending in turn supports a large local consumer service industry. Business service jobs have a high remote work potential. If remote work becomes more prevalent, many business service workers may leave expensive cities and work from elsewhere withdrawing spending from the local non-tradable service industries dependent on their demand. We use the recent COVID-19-induced increase in remote work to test for the strength of this mechanism and find it to be strong. As a result, low-skill service workers in big cities bore most of the pandemic’s economic impact. Our findings have broader implications for the distributional consequences of the US economy’s transition to more remote work.
29181.zh_abstract: 大城市经济专门从事商业服务行业，这些行业工人的本地支出反过来支撑着庞大的本地消费服务行业。商业服务工作的远程工作潜力很高。如果远程工作变得更加普遍，许多商业服务工人可能会离开昂贵的城市，在其他地方工作，从而撤回依赖于他们需求的本地非贸易服务行业的支出。我们利用近期COVID-19引发的远程工作增加来检验这一机制的强度，并发现它很强。因此，大城市的低技能服务工人承受了疫情的大部分经济影响。我们的发现对美国经济向更多远程工作转型的分配后果具有更广泛的意义。

29180.title: Testing Fractional doses of COVID-19 Vaccines
29180.authors: Witold Więcek, Amrita Ahuja, Esha Chaudhuri, Michael Kremer, Alexandre Simoes Gomes, Christopher Snyder, Alex Tabarrok, Brandon Joel Tan
29180.abstract: Due to the enormous economic, health, and social costs of the COVID-19 pandemic, there are high expected social returns to investing in parallel in multiple approaches to accelerating vaccination. We argue there are high expected social returns to investigating the scope for lowering the dosage of some COVID-19 vaccines. While existing evidence is not dispositive, available clinical data on the immunogenicity of lower doses combined with evidence of a high correlation between neutralizing antibody response and vaccine efficacy suggests that half- or even quarter-doses of some vaccines could generate high levels of protection, particularly against severe disease and death, while potentially expanding supply by 450 million to 1.55 billion doses per month, based on supply projections for 2021. An epidemiological model suggests that even if fractional doses are less effective than standard doses, vaccinating more people faster could substantially reduce total infections and deaths. The costs of further testing alternative doses are much lower than the expected public health and economic benefits. However, commercial incentives to generate evidence on fractional dosing are weak, suggesting that testing may not occur without public investment. Governments could support either experimental or observational evaluations of fractional dosing, for either primary or booster shots. Discussions with researchers and government officials in multiple countries where vaccines are scarce suggest strong interest in these approaches.
29180.zh_abstract: 由于COVID-19疫情带来的巨大经济、健康和社会成本，并行投资于多种加速疫苗接种的方法具有很高的预期社会回报。我们认为，研究降低某些COVID-19疫苗剂量的可能性具有很高的预期社会回报。虽然现有证据并非决定性的，但关于较低剂量免疫原性的现有临床数据，结合中和抗体反应与疫苗效力之间存在高度相关性的证据表明，某些疫苗的半剂量甚至四分之一剂量可能产生高水平的保护，特别是针对重症和死亡，同时根据2021年的供应预测，每月可能将供应量扩大4.5亿至15.5亿剂。一个流行病学模型表明，即使分数剂量不如标准剂量有效，更快地为更多人接种疫苗也能大幅减少总感染和死亡人数。进一步测试替代剂量的成本远低于预期的公共卫生和经济效益。然而，产生分数剂量证据的商业激励很弱，这表明如果没有公共投资，测试可能不会发生。政府可以支持分数剂量的实验性或观察性评估，无论是用于初次接种还是加强针。与多个疫苗短缺国家的研究人员和政府官员的讨论表明，对这些方法有浓厚的兴趣。
29180.meta: Programs：DEV, EH；JEL：F62, F68, I1, I15, I18, I31, I38

29179.title: Marginalized and Overlooked? Minoritized Groups and the Adoption of New Scientific Ideas
29179.zh_title: 被边缘化与被忽视？少数群体与新科学思想的采纳
29179.abstract: The diffusion and use of new ideas is critical for producing innovations and realizing their potential. We explore how characteristics of innovators and potential adopters affect the adoption of important, new scientific ideas in networks. Using rich data on biomedical researchers and their networks, natural language processing, and a novel two-way fixed effects strategy, we find that new ideas introduced by female scientists are under-utilized for two reasons. First, female innovators are less connected than men. Second, at short network distances, researchers (especially men) adopt women’s ideas less. Similar gaps hold for underrepresented racial and ethnic minorities.
29179.zh_abstract: 新思想的传播和利用对于产生创新和实现其潜力至关重要。我们探讨了创新者和潜在采纳者的特征如何影响网络中重要的新科学思想的采纳。利用丰富的生物医学研究人员及其网络数据、自然语言处理以及一种新颖的双向固定效应策略，我们发现女性科学家引入的新思想因两个原因而被利用不足。首先，女性创新者的联系不如男性广泛。其次，在短网络距离内，研究人员（尤其是男性）较少采纳女性的思想。对于代表性不足的种族和民族少数群体，也存在类似的差距。
